searchDocs.content: public class Parent { public String parentField; } public class Child extends Parent { public String childField; } // ϊ╜┐ύΦρ RowEncoder ϊ╗ξύΙ╢ύ▒╗ύ▒╗ίηΜύ╝ΨύιΒίΤΝϋπμύιΒ RowEncoder<Parent> encoder = Encoders.bean(Parent.class); Child child = new Child(); child.parentField = "Hello"; child.childField = "World"; BinaryRow row = encoder.toRow(child); Parent decoded = encoder.fromRow(row);   Python ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  import pyfory encoder = pyfory.encoder(Foo) encoder.to_arrow_record_batch([foo] * 10000) encoder.to_arrow_table([foo] * 10000)   C++ ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  std::shared_ptr<ArrowWriter> arrow_writer; EXPECT_TRUE( ArrowWriter::Make(schema, ::arrow::default_memory_pool(), &arrow_writer) .ok()); for (auto &row : rows) { EXPECT_TRUE(arrow_writer->Write(row).ok()); } std::shared_ptr<::arrow::RecordBatch> record_batch; EXPECT_TRUE(arrow_writer->Finish(&record_batch).ok()); EXPECT_TRUE(record_batch->Validate().ok()); EXPECT_EQ(record_batch->num_columns(), schema->num_fields()); EXPECT_EQ(record_batch->num_rows(), row_nums);   Schema schema = TypeInference.inferSchema(BeanA.class); ArrowWriter arrowWriter = ArrowUtils.createArrowWriter(schema); Encoder<BeanA> encoder = Encoders.rowEncoder(BeanA.class); for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) { BeanA beanA = BeanA.createBeanA(2); arrowWriter.write(encoder.toRow(beanA)); } return arrowWriter.finishAsRecordBatch();

import java.util.Arrays; import org.apache.fory.*; import org.apache.fory.config.*; public class Example { public static void main(String[] args) { SomeClass object = new SomeClass(); // ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γFory ίχηϊ╛Μί║Φίερίνγόυκί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΩ┤ίνΞύΦρ Fory fory = Fory.builder().withLanguage(Language.JAVA) .requireClassRegistration(true) .build(); // ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗ίηΜίΠψίΘΠί░Σύ▒╗ίΡΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╝ΑώΦΑΎ╝Νϊ╜Ηϊ╕Ξόαψί╝║ίΙ╢ύγΕήΑΓ // ίΡψύΦρύ▒╗ό│ρίΗΝίΡΟΎ╝ΝόΚΑόεΚϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κύ▒╗ίηΜώΔ╜ί┐Ζώκ╗ό│ρίΗΝήΑΓ fory.register(SomeClass.class); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(object); System.out.println(fory.deserialize(bytes)); } }   ίνγύ║┐ύρΜίε║όβψϊ╕Μ Fory ύγΕύΦρό│ΧΎ╝γ  import java.util.List; import java.util.Arrays; import org.apache.fory.*; import org.apache.fory.config.*; public class Example { public static void main(String[] args) { SomeClass object = new SomeClass(); // ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γFory ίχηϊ╛Μί║Φίερίνγόυκί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΩ┤ίνΞύΦρ ThreadSafeFory fory = new ThreadLocalFory(classLoader -> { Fory f = Fory.builder().withLanguage(Language.JAVA) .withClassLoader(classLoader).build(); f.register(SomeClass.class); return f; }); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(object); System.out.println(fory.deserialize(bytes)); } }   Fory ίχηϊ╛ΜίνΞύΦρύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  import java.util.List; import java.util.Arrays; f.register(SomeClass.class); return f; }); public static void main(String[] args) { SomeClass object = new SomeClass(); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(object); System.out.println(fory.deserialize(bytes)); } }

searchDocs.title: Apache ForyέΕλ ίΙδί╗║έΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ίΞΧύ║┐ύρΜ Fory ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  Fory fory = Fory.builder() .withLanguage(Language.JAVA) // ίΡψύΦρίΖ▒ϊ║τ/ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςήΑΓϋΜξόΩιώΘΞίνΞί╝ΧύΦρίΠψίΖ│ώΩφϊ╗ξόΠΡίΞΘόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΓ .withRefTracking(false) .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.SCHEMA_CONSISTENT) // ίΡψύΦρύ▒╗ίηΜίΚΞίΡΣ/ίΡΟίΡΣίΖ╝ίχ╣ // ϋΜξϋ┐╜ό▒Γόδ┤ί░Πϊ╜ΥύπψίΤΝόδ┤ώταόΑπϋΔ╜ίΠψίΖ│ώΩφ // .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE) // ίΡψύΦρί╝Γόφξίνγύ║┐ύρΜύ╝ΨϋψΣ .withAsyncCompilation(true) .build(); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(object); System.out.println(fory.deserialize(bytes));   ύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρ Fory ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  ThreadSafeFory fory = Fory.builder() .withLanguage(Language.JAVA) // ίΡψύΦρίΖ▒ϊ║τ/ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςήΑΓϋΜξόΩιώΘΞίνΞί╝ΧύΦρίΠψίΖ│ώΩφϊ╗ξόΠΡίΞΘόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΓ .withRefTracking(false) // ίΡψύΦρ int ίΟΜύ╝σ // .withIntCompressed(true) // ίΡψύΦρ long ίΟΜύ╝σ // .withLongCompressed(true) .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.SCHEMA_CONSISTENT) // ίΡψύΦρύ▒╗ίηΜίΚΞίΡΣ/ίΡΟίΡΣίΖ╝ίχ╣ // ϋΜξϋ┐╜ό▒Γόδ┤ί░Πϊ╜ΥύπψίΤΝόδ┤ώταόΑπϋΔ╜ίΠψίΖ│ώΩφ // .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE) // ίΡψύΦρί╝Γόφξίνγύ║┐ύρΜύ╝ΨϋψΣ .withAsyncCompilation(true) .buildThreadSafeFory(); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(object); System.out.println(fory.deserialize(bytes));

searchDocs.content: ίερίχηώβΖύ│╗ύ╗θϊ╕φΎ╝Νί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύΦρίΙ░ύγΕύ▒╗ύ╗ΥόηΕίΠψϋΔ╜ϊ╝γώγΠόΩ╢ώΩ┤ίΠαίΝΨΎ╝ΝόψΦίοΓίφΩόχ╡ύγΕίληίΙιήΑΓί╜Υί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΤΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψϊ╜┐ύΦρϊ╕ΞίΡΝύΚΙόευύγΕ jar όΩ╢Ύ╝Νύ▒╗ύ╗ΥόηΕίΠψϋΔ╜ϊ╕Ξϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤ήΑΓ  Fory ώ╗αϋχνώΘΘύΦρ CompatibleMode.SCHEMA_CONSISTENTΎ╝ΝίΞ│ϋοΒό▒Γί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΤΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψύ▒╗ύ╗ΥόηΕϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤Ύ╝Νϊ╗ξϋΟ╖ί╛ΩόεΑί░ΠύγΕί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╜ΥύπψίΤΝόεΑώταόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΓίοΓόηεύ╗ΥόηΕϊ╕Ξϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤Ύ╝ΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╝γίν▒ϋ┤ξήΑΓ  ίοΓώεΑόΦψόΝΒύ▒╗ύ╗ΥόηΕό╝ΦίΝΨΎ╝ΙίΚΞίΡΣ/ίΡΟίΡΣίΖ╝ίχ╣Ύ╝ΚΎ╝ΝώεΑί░Η Fory ώΖΞύ╜χϊ╕║ CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLEΎ╝ΝίΖΒϋχ╕ίφΩόχ╡ίληίΙιΎ╝ΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψίΠψϋΘςίΛρώΑΓώΖΞϊ╕ΞίΡΝύ╗ΥόηΕήΑΓ  ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  Fory fory = Fory.builder() .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE) .build(); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(object); System.out.println(fory.deserialize(bytes));   ίΖ╝ίχ╣όρκί╝Πϊ╕ΜΎ╝Νύ▒╗ίΖΔόΧ░όΞχϊ╝γίΗβίΖξί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύ╗ΥόηεήΑΓApache ForyέΕλ ώΘΘύΦρώταόΧΙίΟΜύ╝σύχΩό│ΧώβΞϊ╜ΟίΖΔόΧ░όΞχί╝ΑώΦΑΎ╝Νϊ╜Ηϊ╗Ξϊ╝γόεΚϊ╕Αίχγϊ╜ΥύπψίληίΛιήΑΓϊ╕║ϋ┐δϊ╕ΑόφξώβΞϊ╜ΟίΖΔόΧ░όΞχόΙΡόευΎ╝ΝApache ForyέΕλ όΦψόΝΒίΖΔόΧ░όΞχίΖ▒ϊ║τόε║ίΙ╢Ύ╝ΝϋψοόΔΖϋπΒMeta SharingήΑΓ

searchDocs.content: ForyBuilder#withIntCompressed/ForyBuilder#withLongCompressed ίΠψύΦρϊ║ΟίΟΜύ╝σ int/long ύ▒╗ίηΜϊ╗ξίΘΠί░Πϊ╜ΥύπψήΑΓώ╗αϋχνίζΘϊ╕║ί╝ΑίΡψήΑΓ  ίοΓόηεί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╜Υύπψϊ╕ΞόΧΠόΕθΎ╝ΙίοΓϊ╣ΜίΚΞύΦρ flatbuffers ύφΚόΩιίΟΜύ╝σόι╝ί╝ΠΎ╝ΚΎ╝Νί╗║ϋχχίΖ│ώΩφίΟΜύ╝σϊ╗ξόΠΡίΞΘόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΓίψ╣ϊ║ΟίΖρϊ╕║όΧ░ίφΩύγΕόΧ░όΞχΎ╝ΝίΟΜύ╝σίΠψϋΔ╜ί╕οόζξ 80% ύγΕόΑπϋΔ╜όΞθίν▒ήΑΓ  int ίΟΜύ╝σώΘΘύΦρ 1~5 ίφΩϋΛΓίΠαώΧ┐ύ╝ΨύιΒΎ╝Νlong ίΟΜύ╝σόΦψόΝΒϊ╕νύπΞόΨ╣ί╝ΠΎ╝γ  SLIΎ╝ΙSmall long as intΎ╝Νώ╗αϋχνΎ╝ΚΎ╝γlong ίερ [-1073741824, 1073741823] ϋΝΔίδ┤ίΗΖύΦρ 4 ίφΩϋΛΓύ╝ΨύιΒΎ╝ΝίΡοίΙβύΦρ 9 ίφΩϋΛΓήΑΓPVLΎ╝ΙProgressive Variable-length LongΎ╝ΚΎ╝γώΘΘύΦρίΠαώΧ┐ύ╝ΨύιΒΎ╝Νϋ┤θόΧ░ώΑγϋ┐Θ (v << 1) ^ (v >> 63) ϋ╜υόΞλήΑΓ  ίοΓ long ύ▒╗ίηΜόΧ░όΞχόΩιό│ΧόεΚόΧΙίΟΜύ╝σΎ╝Νί╗║ϋχχίΖ│ώΩφ long ίΟΜύ╝σϊ╗ξόΠΡίΞΘόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: όθΡϊ║δίε║όβψϊ╕ΜώεΑϊ╕║ύΚ╣ίχγύ▒╗ίηΜίχηύΟ░ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρΎ╝Νί░νίΖ╢όαψ JDK writeObject/writeReplace/readObject/readResolve όΨ╣ί╝ΠόΧΙύΟΘϋ╛Δϊ╜ΟόΩ╢ήΑΓίοΓϊ╕Μϊ╛ΜΎ╝ΝώΒ┐ίΖΞ Foo#writeObject ϋλτϋ░ΔύΦρΎ╝γ  class Foo { public long f1; private void writeObject(ObjectOutputStream s) throws IOException { System.out.println(f1); s.defaultWriteObject(); } } class FooSerializer extends Serializer<Foo> { public FooSerializer(Fory fory) { super(fory, Foo.class); } @Override public void write(MemoryBuffer buffer, Foo value) { buffer.writeInt64(value.f1); } @Override public Foo read(MemoryBuffer buffer) { Foo foo = new Foo(); foo.f1 = buffer.readInt64(); return foo; } }   ό│ρίΗΝϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρΎ╝γ  Fory fory = getFory(); fory.registerSerializer(Foo.class, new FooSerializer(fory));

searchDocs.title: ίχηύΟ░ώδΗίΡΙύ▒╗ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╕Ο Map ύ▒╗ϊ╝╝Ύ╝ΝίχηύΟ░ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κ Collection ύ▒╗ίηΜύγΕί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρόΩ╢Ύ╝ΝώεΑύ╗πόΚ┐ CollectionSerializer όΙΨ AbstractCollectionSerializerήΑΓϊ║ΝϋΑΖίΝ║ίΙτίερϊ║ΟΎ╝ΝAbstractCollectionSerializer ίΠψύΦρϊ║Οί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύ▒╗ϊ╝╝ώδΗίΡΙύ╗ΥόηΕϊ╜Ηϊ╕Ξόαψ Java Collection ίφΡύ▒╗ύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜήΑΓ  ίψ╣ϊ║ΟώδΗίΡΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρΎ╝ΝόεΚϊ╕Αϊ╕ςύΚ╣όχΛίΠΓόΧ░ supportCodegenHook ώεΑϋοΒώΖΞύ╜χΎ╝γ  ϋχ╛ϊ╕║ true όΩ╢Ύ╝γ ίΡψύΦρώδΗίΡΙίΖΔύ┤ιύγΕώταόΧΙϋχ┐ώΩχίΤΝ JIT ύ╝ΨϋψΣΎ╝ΝόΠΡίΞΘόΑπϋΔ╜ύδ┤όΟξί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϋ░ΔύΦρΎ╝ΝίΗΖϋΒΦ map ύγΕ key-valueΎ╝ΝόΩιίΛρόΑΒίΙΗίΠΣί╝ΑώΦΑόΟρϋΞΡύΦρϊ║ΟόιΘίΘΗώδΗίΡΙύ▒╗ίηΜ ϋχ╛ϊ╕║ false όΩ╢Ύ╝γ ώΘΘύΦρόΟξίΠμόΨ╣ί╝Πϋχ┐ώΩχίΖΔύ┤ιΎ╝ΝίΛρόΑΒίΙΗίΠΣΎ╝ΝύΒ╡ό┤╗όΑπόδ┤ώταώΑΓίΡΙόεΚύΚ╣όχΛί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώεΑό▒ΓύγΕϋΘςίχγϊ╣ΚώδΗίΡΙίΠψίνΕύΡΗίνΞόζΓώδΗίΡΙίχηύΟ░  όΦψόΝΒ JIT ύγΕώδΗίΡΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρίχηύΟ░έΑΜ  ίχηύΟ░όΦψόΝΒ JIT ύγΕώδΗίΡΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρόΩ╢Ύ╝ΝίΠψίΙσύΦρ Fory ύΟ░όεΚύγΕϊ║Νϋ┐δίΙ╢όι╝ί╝ΠίΤΝώδΗίΡΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίθ║ύκΑϋχ╛όΨ╜ήΑΓίΖ│ώΦχίερϊ║ΟόφμύκχίχηύΟ░ onCollectionWrite ίΤΝ newCollection όΨ╣ό│Χϊ╗ξίνΕύΡΗίΖΔόΧ░όΞχΎ╝ΝίΖ╢ϊ╜βίΖΔύ┤ιί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύΦ▒ Fory ϋΘςίΛρίχΝόΙΡήΑΓ  ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  public class CustomCollectionSerializer<T extends Collection> extends CollectionSerializer<T> { public CustomCollectionSerializer(Fory fory, Class<T> cls) { // supportCodegenHook όΟπίΙ╢όαψίΡοίΡψύΦρ JIT ύ╝ΨϋψΣ super(fory, cls, true); } @Override public Collection onCollectionWrite(MemoryBuffer buffer, T value) { // ίΗβίΖξώδΗίΡΙίνπί░Π buffer.writeVarUint32Small7(value.size()); // ίΠψίΗβίΖξώλζίνΨώδΗίΡΙίΖΔόΧ░όΞχ return value; } @Override public Collection newCollection(MemoryBuffer buffer) { // ίΙδί╗║όΨ░ώδΗίΡΙίχηϊ╛Μ Collection collection = super.newCollection(buffer); // ϋψ╗ίΠΨί╣╢ϋχ╛ύ╜χώδΗίΡΙίνπί░Π int numElements = getAndClearNumElements(); setNumElements(numElements); return collection; } }   ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γίχηύΟ░ newCollection όΩ╢ώεΑϋ░ΔύΦρ setNumElementsΎ╝Νϊ╗ξίΣΛύθξ Fory ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίνγί░ΣίΖΔύ┤ιήΑΓ  ϊ╕ΞόΦψόΝΒ JIT ύγΕϋΘςίχγϊ╣ΚώδΗίΡΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ  όεΚόΩ╢ώεΑί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί║Χί▒Γϊ╕║ίΟθίπΜόΧ░ύ╗ΕόΙΨόεΚύΚ╣όχΛώεΑό▒ΓύγΕώδΗίΡΙύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝόφνόΩ╢ίΠψύοΒύΦρ JITΎ╝Νύδ┤όΟξώΘΞίΗβ write ίΤΝ read όΨ╣ό│ΧήΑΓ  ϋ┐βύπΞόΨ╣ί╝ΠΎ╝γ  ίχΝίΖρόΟπίΙ╢ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόι╝ί╝ΠώΑΓίΡΙίΟθίπΜόΧ░ύ╗Εϋ╖│ϋ┐ΘώδΗίΡΙϋ┐φϊ╗μί╝ΑώΦΑίΠψύδ┤όΟξίΗΖίφαϋχ┐ώΩχ  ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝ΙίΟθίπΜ int όΧ░ύ╗ΕΎ╝ΚΎ╝γ  class IntList extends AbstractCollection<Integer> { private final int[] elements; private final int size; public IntList(int size) { this.elements = new int[size]; this.size = size; } public IntList(int[] elements, int size) { this.elements = elements; this.size = size; } @Override public Iterator<Integer> iterator() { return new Iterator<Integer>() { private int index = 0; @Override public boolean hasNext() { return index < size; } @Override public Integer next() { if (!hasNext()) throw new NoSuchElementException(); return elements[index++]; } }; } @Override public int size() { return size; } public int get(int index) { if (index >= size) throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException(); return elements[index]; } public void set(int index, int value) { if (index >= size) throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException(); elements[index] = value; } public int[] getElements() { return elements; } } class IntListSerializer extends AbstractCollectionSerializer<IntList> { public IntListSerializer(Fory fory) { // ύοΒύΦρ JITΎ╝ΝίχΝίΖρϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ super(fory, IntList.class, false); } @Override public void write(MemoryBuffer buffer, IntList value) { buffer.writeVarUint32Small7(value.size()); int[] elements = value.getElements(); for (int i = 0; i < value.size(); i++) { buffer.writeVarInt32(elements[i]); } } @Override public IntList read(MemoryBuffer buffer) { int size = buffer.readVarUint32Small7(); int[] elements = new int[size]; for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { elements[i] = buffer.readVarInt32(); } return new IntList(elements, size); } // JIT ύοΒύΦρόΩ╢ϊ╗ξϊ╕ΜόΨ╣ό│Χϊ╕Ξϊ╜┐ύΦρ @Override public Collection onCollectionWrite(MemoryBuffer buffer, IntList value) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); } @Override public Collection newCollection(MemoryBuffer buffer) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); } @Override public IntList onCollectionRead(Collection collection) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); } }   ίΖ│ώΦχύΓ╣ϋψ┤όαΟΎ╝γ  ίΟθίπΜόΧ░ύ╗ΕίφαίΓρΎ╝γύδ┤όΟξύΦρ int[]Ύ╝ΝώΒ┐ίΖΞϋμΖύχ▒/όΜΗύχ▒Ύ╝ΝίΗΖίφαί╕Δί▒ΑώταόΧΙήΑΓύδ┤όΟξί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝γίΖΙίΗβ sizeΎ╝ΝίΗΞίΗβίΟθίπΜίΑ╝Ύ╝ΝόΩιώεΑϋ┐φϊ╗μΎ╝ΝόΩιϋμΖύχ▒/όΜΗύχ▒ήΑΓύδ┤όΟξίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝γίΖΙϋψ╗ sizeΎ╝ΝίΗΞϋψ╗ίΟθίπΜίΑ╝ίκτίΖΖόΧ░ύ╗ΕΎ╝ΝόεΑίΡΟόηΕώΑιίψ╣ϋ▒κήΑΓύοΒύΦρ JITΎ╝γsupportCodegenHook=falseΎ╝ΝώΘΞίΗβ write/readΎ╝ΝίχΝίΖρϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κόι╝ί╝ΠήΑΓ  ώΑΓύΦρίε║όβψΎ╝γ  ίΠςίνΕύΡΗίΟθίπΜύ▒╗ίηΜόΑπϋΔ╜όηΒϋΘ┤ϋοΒό▒ΓώεΑόεΑί░ΠίΗΖίφαί╝ΑώΦΑόεΚύΚ╣όχΛί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώεΑό▒Γ  ϊ╜┐ύΦρύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  IntList list = new IntList(3); list.set(0, 1); list.set(1, 2); list.set(2, 3); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(list); IntList newList = (IntList) fory.deserialize(bytes);   ϋβ╜ύΕ╢όΦ╛ί╝Δϊ║Η Fory ύγΕώΔρίΙΗϊ╝αίΝΨΎ╝Νϊ╜Ηίψ╣ίΟθίπΜύ▒╗ίηΜίΤΝύδ┤όΟξόΧ░ύ╗Εϋχ┐ώΩχίε║όβψόΑπϋΔ╜όηΒώταήΑΓ  ίχηύΟ░ collection-like ύ▒╗ίηΜί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ  όεΚόΩ╢ώεΑϊ╕║ύ▒╗ϊ╝╝ώδΗίΡΙϊ╜ΗώζηόιΘίΘΗ Java Collection ύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜίχηύΟ░ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρήΑΓίΟθίΙβίοΓϊ╕ΜΎ╝γ  ύ╗πόΚ┐ AbstractCollectionSerializerίΡψύΦρ JIT ϊ╝αίΝΨΎ╝ΙsupportCodegenHook=trueΎ╝ΚώΑγϋ┐ΘϋπΗίδ╛ύ▒╗ώταόΧΙϋχ┐ώΩχίΖΔύ┤ιόφμύκχύχκύΡΗ size  ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  class CustomCollectionLike { private final Object[] elements; private final int size; public CustomCollectionLike(int size) { this.elements = new Object[size]; this.size = size; } public CustomCollectionLike(Object[] elements, int size) { this.elements = elements; this.size = size; } public Object get(int index) { if (index >= size) throw new IndexOutOfBoundsException(); return elements[index]; } public int size() { return size; } public Object[] getElements() { return elements; } } class CollectionView extends AbstractCollection<Object> { private final Object[] elements; private final int size; private int writeIndex; public CollectionView(CustomCollectionLike collection) { this.elements = collection.getElements(); this.size = collection.size(); } public CollectionView(int size) { this.size = size; this.elements = new Object[size]; } @Override public Iterator<Object> iterator() { return new Iterator<Object>() { private int index = 0; @Override public boolean hasNext() { return index < size; } @Override public Object next() { if (!hasNext()) throw new NoSuchElementException(); return elements[index++]; } }; } @Override public boolean add(Object element) { if (writeIndex >= size) throw new IllegalStateException("Collection is full"); elements[writeIndex++] = element; return true; } @Override public int size() { return size; } public Object[] getElements() { return elements; } } class CustomCollectionSerializer extends AbstractCollectionSerializer<CustomCollectionLike> { public CustomCollectionSerializer(Fory fory) { super(fory, CustomCollectionLike.class, true); } @Override public Collection onCollectionWrite(MemoryBuffer buffer, CustomCollectionLike value) { buffer.writeVarUint32Small7(value.size()); return new CollectionView(value); } @Override public Collection newCollection(MemoryBuffer buffer) { int numElements = buffer.readVarUint32Small7(); setNumElements(numElements); return new CollectionView(numElements); } @Override public CustomCollectionLike onCollectionRead(Collection collection) { CollectionView view = (CollectionView) collection; return new CustomCollectionLike(view.getElements(), view.size()); } }   ίΖ│ώΦχύΓ╣ϋψ┤όαΟΎ╝γ  όΧ░ύ╗ΕίφαίΓρΎ╝ΝίχγώΧ┐Ύ╝Νύδ┤όΟξϋχ┐ώΩχϋπΗίδ╛ύ▒╗ύ╗πόΚ┐ AbstractCollectionΎ╝ΝίχηύΟ░ϋ┐φϊ╗μίΤΝ addόΦψόΝΒ JIT ϊ╝αίΝΨΎ╝ΝόΧ░ύ╗Εώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζόΑπϋΔ╜ϊ╝αίΖΙΎ╝ΝύΒ╡ό┤╗όΑπύΧξϊ╜Ο    ίοΓώεΑύ╗πύ╗φϋκξίΖΖ map-like ύ▒╗ίηΜήΑΒό│ρίΗΝϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρήΑΒExternalizable όΦψόΝΒύφΚίΗΖίχ╣Ύ╝Νϋψ╖ίδηίνΞ"ύ╗πύ╗φ"Ύ╝Β

searchDocs.title: ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κ Map ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κ Map ύ▒╗ίηΜί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρώεΑύ╗πόΚ┐ MapSerializer όΙΨ AbstractMapSerializerήΑΓϊ║ΝϋΑΖίΝ║ίΙτύ▒╗ϊ╝╝ώδΗίΡΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρήΑΓ  supportCodegenHook=trueΎ╝γόΟρϋΞΡύΦρϊ║ΟόιΘίΘΗ MapΎ╝ΝόΦψόΝΒ JIT ϊ╝αίΝΨsupportCodegenHook=falseΎ╝γώΑΓίΡΙύΚ╣όχΛώεΑό▒ΓΎ╝ΝώεΑόΚΜίΛρίχηύΟ░ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΑ╗ϋ╛Σ  όΦψόΝΒ JIT ύγΕ Map ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρύν║ϊ╛ΜέΑΜ  public class CustomMapSerializer<T extends Map> extends MapSerializer<T> { public CustomMapSerializer(Fory fory, Class<T> cls) { super(fory, cls, true); } @Override public Map onMapWrite(MemoryBuffer buffer, T value) { buffer.writeVarUint32Small7(value.size()); return value; } @Override public Map newMap(MemoryBuffer buffer) { int numElements = buffer.readVarUint32Small7(); setNumElements(numElements); return new HashMap(numElements); } }   ϊ╕ΞόΦψόΝΒ JIT ύγΕϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κ Map ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ  ώΑΓύΦρϊ║ΟόεΚύΚ╣όχΛίφΩόχ╡όΙΨϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κϊ║Νϋ┐δίΙ╢όι╝ί╝ΠύγΕ Map ύ▒╗ίηΜήΑΓ  class FixedValueMap extends AbstractMap<String, Integer> { // ... ύεΒύΧξίχηύΟ░ ... } class FixedValueMapSerializer extends AbstractMapSerializer<FixedValueMap> { public FixedValueMapSerializer(Fory fory) { super(fory, FixedValueMap.class, false); } @Override public void write(MemoryBuffer buffer, FixedValueMap value) { buffer.writeInt32(value.getFixedValue()); buffer.writeVarUint32Small7(value.getKeys().size()); for (String key : value.getKeys()) { buffer.writeString(key); } } @Override public FixedValueMap read(MemoryBuffer buffer) { int fixedValue = buffer.readInt32(); int size = buffer.readVarUint32Small7(); Set<String> keys = new HashSet<>(size); for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { keys.add(buffer.readString()); } return new FixedValueMap(keys, fixedValue); } @Override public Map onMapWrite(MemoryBuffer buffer, FixedValueMap value) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); } @Override public FixedValueMap onMapRead(Map map) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); } @Override public FixedValueMap onMapCopy(Map map) { throw new UnsupportedOperationException(); } }

searchDocs.title: ό│ρίΗΝϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ίχηύΟ░ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρίΡΟΎ╝ΝώεΑώΑγϋ┐ΘίοΓϊ╕ΜόΨ╣ί╝Πό│ρίΗΝΎ╝γ  Fory fory = Fory.builder() .withLanguage(Language.JAVA) .build(); // ό│ρίΗΝ Map ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρ fory.registerSerializer(CustomMap.class, new CustomMapSerializer<>(fory, CustomMap.class)); // ό│ρίΗΝώδΗίΡΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρ fory.registerSerializer(CustomCollection.class, new CustomCollectionSerializer<>(fory, CustomCollection.class));   ό│ρόΕΠϊ║Μώκ╣Ύ╝γ ίπΜύ╗Ιύ╗πόΚ┐ίΡΙώΑΓύγΕίθ║ύ▒╗Ύ╝ΙMap ύΦρ MapSerializer/AbstractMapSerializerΎ╝ΝώδΗίΡΙύΦρ CollectionSerializer/AbstractCollectionSerializerΎ╝Κόι╣όΞχ supportCodegenHook ώΑΚόΜσόΑπϋΔ╜ϊ╕ΟύΒ╡ό┤╗όΑπίοΓώεΑί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςΎ╝ΝώεΑόφμύκχίνΕύΡΗsupportCodegenHook=true όΩ╢Ύ╝ΝώεΑύΦρ setNumElements/getAndClearNumElements ύχκύΡΗίΖΔύ┤ιόΧ░ώΘΠ

searchDocs.title: ίχΚίΖρϊ╕Ού▒╗ό│ρίΗΝέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ForyBuilder#requireClassRegistration ίΠψίΖ│ώΩφύ▒╗ό│ρίΗΝόικώςΝΎ╝ΝίΖΒϋχ╕ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόεςύθξύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝύΒ╡ό┤╗ϊ╜ΗόεΚίχΚίΖρώμΟώβσήΑΓ  ίοΓόΩιό│Χύκχϊ┐ζύΟψίλΔίχΚίΖρΎ╝ΝίΙΘίΜ┐ίΖ│ώΩφύ▒╗ό│ρίΗΝήΑΓ ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόεςύθξ/ϊ╕ΞίΠΩϊ┐κϊ╗╗ύ▒╗ίηΜόΩ╢Ύ╝ΝόΒ╢όΕΠϊ╗μύιΒίΠψϋΔ╜ίερ init/equals/hashCode ύφΚόΨ╣ό│Χϊ╕φϋλτόΚπϋκΝήΑΓ  ύ▒╗ό│ρίΗΝϊ╕Ξϊ╗ΖόΠΡίΞΘίχΚίΖρόΑπΎ╝Νϋ┐αίΠψίΘΠί░Σύ▒╗ίΡΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╝ΑώΦΑήΑΓό│ρίΗΝώκ║ί║ΠώεΑϊ┐ζόΝΒί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψϊ╕ΟίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤ήΑΓ  Fory fory = xxx; fory.register(SomeClass.class); fory.register(SomeClass1.class, 200);   ίοΓώεΑίΖ│ώΩφό│ρίΗΝόικώςΝΎ╝ΝίΠψώΑγϋ┐Θ ClassResolver#setClassChecker ϋΘςίχγϊ╣ΚίΖΒϋχ╕ύγΕύ▒╗ίΡΞΎ╝γ  Fory fory = xxx; fory.getClassResolver().setClassChecker( (classResolver, className) -> className.startsWith("org.example."));   όΙΨϊ╜┐ύΦρ AllowListCheckerΎ╝γ  AllowListChecker checker = new AllowListChecker(AllowListChecker.CheckLevel.STRICT); ThreadSafeFory fory = new ThreadLocalFory(classLoader -> { Fory f = Fory.builder().requireClassRegistration(true).withClassLoader(classLoader).build(); f.getClassResolver().setClassChecker(checker); checker.addListener(f.getClassResolver()); return f; }); checker.allowClass("org.example.*");   Fory όΠΡϊ╛δϊ║Η org.apache.fory.resolver.AllowListCheckerΎ╝Νϊ╣θίΠψϋΘςϋκΝίχηύΟ░όδ┤ίνΞόζΓύγΕόικώςΝώΑ╗ϋ╛ΣήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: όΝΚίΡΞύπ░ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗έΑΜ
searchDocs.content: όΝΚ id ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗όΑπϋΔ╜ίΤΝϊ╜Υύπψόδ┤ϊ╝αΎ╝Νϊ╜ΗίοΓώεΑύχκύΡΗίνπώΘΠύ▒╗ίηΜ idΎ╝ΝίΠψύΦρ register(Class<?> cls, String namespace, String typeName) όΝΚίΡΞύπ░ό│ρίΗΝΎ╝γ  fory.register(Foo.class, "demo", "Foo");   ίοΓόΩιώΘΞίΡΞΎ╝Νnamespace ίΠψϊ╕║ύσ║ϊ╗ξίΘΠί░Σϊ╜ΥύπψήΑΓ  ϊ╕Ξί╗║ϋχχύΦρίΡΞύπ░ό│ρίΗΝΎ╝Νίδιί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╜Υύπψϊ╝γόα╛ϋΣΩίληίΛιήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Apache ForyέΕλ όΦψόΝΒώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝ΝίΠψώταόΧΙίνΕύΡΗίνπίψ╣ϋ▒κόΙΨύδ┤όΟξίΗΖίφαύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ήΑΓύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  import org.apache.fory.*; import org.apache.fory.config.*; import org.apache.fory.serializer.BufferObject; import org.apache.fory.memory.MemoryBuffer; import java.util.*; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class ZeroCopyExample { // ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γFory ίχηϊ╛Μί║ΦίνΞύΦρΎ╝Νϊ╕ΞϋοΒόψΠόυκόΨ░ί╗║ static Fory fory = Fory.builder() .withLanguage(Language.JAVA) .build(); // mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass="io.ray.fory.examples.ZeroCopyExample" public static void main(String[] args) { List<Object> list = Arrays.asList("str", new byte[1000], new int[100], new double[100]); Collection<BufferObject> bufferObjects = new ArrayList<>(); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(list, e -> !bufferObjects.add(e)); List<MemoryBuffer> buffers = bufferObjects.stream() .map(BufferObject::toBuffer).collect(Collectors.toList()); System.out.println(fory.deserialize(bytes, buffers)); } }

searchDocs.title: ίΖΔόΧ░όΞχίΖ▒ϊ║τΎ╝ΙMeta SharingΎ╝ΚέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Apache ForyέΕλ όΦψόΝΒίερίΡΝϊ╕Αϊ╕Λϊ╕ΜόΨΘΎ╝ΙίοΓ TCP ϋ┐ηόΟξΎ╝ΚίΗΖίΖ▒ϊ║τύ▒╗ίηΜίΖΔόΧ░όΞχΎ╝Ιύ▒╗ίΡΞήΑΒίφΩόχ╡ίΡΞήΑΒόεΑύ╗ΙίφΩόχ╡ύ▒╗ίηΜύφΚΎ╝ΚήΑΓώοΨόυκί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΩ╢ίΖΔόΧ░όΞχϊ╝γίΠΣώΑΒίΙ░ίψ╣ύτψΎ╝Νίψ╣ύτψίΠψίθ║ϊ║ΟίΖΔόΧ░όΞχώΘΞί╗║ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρΎ╝ΝίΡΟύ╗φί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΩιώεΑώΘΞίνΞϊ╝ιϋ╛ΥίΖΔόΧ░όΞχΎ╝Νϊ╗ΟϋΑΝίΘΠί░Σύ╜Σύ╗εό╡ΒώΘΠί╣╢ϋΘςίΛρόΦψόΝΒύ▒╗ίηΜίΚΞίΡΣ/ίΡΟίΡΣίΖ╝ίχ╣ήΑΓ  // Fory.builder() // .withLanguage(Language.JAVA) // .withRefTracking(false) // // ϋ╖ρί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖ▒ϊ║τίΖΔόΧ░όΞχ // .withMetaContextShare(true) // ώζηύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρ Fory MetaContext context = xxx; fory.getSerializationContext().setMetaContext(context); byte[] bytes = fory.serialize(o); // ώζηύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρ Fory MetaContext context = xxx; fory.getSerializationContext().setMetaContext(context); fory.deserialize(bytes); // ύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρ Fory fory.setClassLoader(beanA.getClass().getClassLoader()); byte[] serialized = fory.execute( f -> { f.getSerializationContext().setMetaContext(context); return f.serialize(beanA); } ); // ύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρ Fory fory.setClassLoader(beanA.getClass().getClassLoader()); Object newObj = fory.execute( f -> { f.getSerializationContext().setMetaContext(context); return f.deserialize(serialized); } );

searchDocs.title: ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╕ΞίφαίερύγΕύ▒╗έΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Apache ForyέΕλ όΦψόΝΒίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╕ΞίφαίερύγΕύ▒╗ήΑΓώΑγϋ┐Θ ForyBuilder#deserializeNonexistentClass(true) ίΡψύΦρήΑΓί╜ΥίΡψύΦρϊ╕ΦίΖΔόΧ░όΞχίΖ▒ϊ║τί╝ΑίΡψόΩ╢Ύ╝ΝFory ϊ╝γί░Ηϋψξύ▒╗ίηΜύγΕόΧ░όΞχίφαίΓρϊ╕║ Map ύγΕόΔ░όΑπίφΡύ▒╗Ύ╝ΝώΒ┐ίΖΞίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΩ╢ίκτίΖΖ Map ύγΕώΘΞόΟΤί╝ΑώΦΑΎ╝ΝόΠΡίΞΘόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΓίοΓόηεόΧ░όΞχϋλτίΠΣώΑΒίΙ░ίΠοϊ╕Αϊ╕ςϋ┐δύρΜϊ╕Φϋψξύ▒╗ίφαίερΎ╝ΝίΙβίΠψόΩιόΞθϋ┐αίΟθϊ╕║ίΟθύ▒╗ίηΜίψ╣ϋ▒κήΑΓ  ϋΜξόεςίΡψύΦρίΖΔόΧ░όΞχίΖ▒ϊ║τΎ╝ΝίΙβόΨ░ύ▒╗όΧ░όΞχϊ╝γϋλτϋ╖│ϋ┐ΘΎ╝Νϋ┐Φίδη NonexistentSkipClass ίΞιϊ╜Ξίψ╣ϋ▒κήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ύ▒╗ίηΜόαιί░ΕΎ╝Ιϋ╖ρύ▒╗ίηΜό╖▒όΜ╖ϋ┤ζ/όαιί░ΕΎ╝ΚέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Apache ForyέΕλ όΦψόΝΒί░Ηϊ╕Αϊ╕ςύ▒╗ίηΜύγΕίψ╣ϋ▒κό╖▒όΜ╖ϋ┤ζ/όαιί░Εϊ╕║ίΠοϊ╕Αϊ╕ςύ▒╗ίηΜήΑΓό│ρόΕΠϊ║Μώκ╣Ύ╝γ  ϋψξόαιί░Εϊ╝γόΚπϋκΝό╖▒όΜ╖ϋ┤ζΎ╝ΝόΚΑόεΚόαιί░ΕίφΩόχ╡ϊ╝γίΖΙί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╕║ϊ║Νϋ┐δίΙ╢Ύ╝ΝίΗΞίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╕║ύδχόιΘύ▒╗ίηΜήΑΓόΚΑόεΚύ╗ΥόηΕϊ╜Υύ▒╗ίηΜί┐Ζώκ╗ύΦρύδ╕ίΡΝ ID ό│ρίΗΝΎ╝ΝίΡοίΙβόΩιό│Χόφμύκχόαιί░ΕήΑΓίΛκί┐Ζϊ┐ζϋψΒί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΤΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψό│ρίΗΝώκ║ί║Πϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤ήΑΓ  ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  public class StructMappingExample { static class Struct1 { int f1; String f2; public Struct1(int f1, String f2) { this.f1 = f1; this.f2 = f2; } } static class Struct2 { int f1; String f2; double f3; } static ThreadSafeFory fory1 = Fory.builder() .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE).buildThreadSafeFory(); static ThreadSafeFory fory2 = Fory.builder() .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE).buildThreadSafeFory(); static { fory1.register(Struct1.class); fory2.register(Struct2.class); } public static void main(String[] args) { Struct1 struct1 = new Struct1(10, "abc"); Struct2 struct2 = (Struct2) fory2.deserialize(fory1.serialize(struct1)); Assert.assertEquals(struct2.f1, struct1.f1); Assert.assertEquals(struct2.f2, struct1.f2); struct1 = (Struct1) fory1.deserialize(fory2.serialize(struct2)); Assert.assertEquals(struct1.f1, struct2.f1); Assert.assertEquals(struct1.f2, struct2.f2); } }

searchDocs.content: ϋΜξόεςϋχ╛ύ╜χ CompatibleMode ϊ╕║ org.apache.fory.config.CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLEΎ╝ΝίΘ║ύΟ░ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╝Γί╕╕Ύ╝ΝίΠψϋΔ╜όαψί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψίΤΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψύ▒╗ύ╗ΥόηΕϊ╕Ξϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤ήΑΓ  όφνόΩ╢ίΠψύΦρ ForyBuilder#withClassVersionCheck ίΙδί╗║ Fory ϋ┐δϋκΝόικώςΝΎ╝ΝϋΜξίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΛδίΘ║ org.apache.fory.exception.ClassNotCompatibleExceptionΎ╝Νϋψ┤όαΟύ▒╗ύ╗ΥόηΕϊ╕Ξϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤Ύ╝Νί║ΦόΦ╣ύΦρ ForyBuilder#withCompaibleMode(CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE)ήΑΓ  CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE ϊ╝γί╕οόζξϊ╕ΑίχγόΑπϋΔ╜ίΤΝϊ╜Υύπψί╝ΑώΦΑΎ╝ΝϋΜξύ▒╗ύ╗ΥόηΕίπΜύ╗Ιϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤Ύ╝Νϊ╕Ξί╗║ϋχχώ╗αϋχνί╝ΑίΡψήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: POJO ϋ╖ρύ▒╗ίηΜίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Apache ForyέΕλ όΦψόΝΒί░Ηϊ╕Αϊ╕ς POJO ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΡΟίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╕║ϊ╕ΞίΡΝύ╗ΥόηΕύγΕ POJOήΑΓόφνόΩ╢ώεΑί░Η CompatibleMode ϋχ╛ϊ╕║ org.apache.fory.config.CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLEήΑΓ  public class DeserializeIntoType { static class Struct1 { int f1; String f2; public Struct1(int f1, String f2) { this.f1 = f1; this.f2 = f2; } } static class Struct2 { int f1; String f2; double f3; } static ThreadSafeFory fory = Fory.builder() .withCompatibleMode(CompatibleMode.COMPATIBLE).buildThreadSafeFory(); public static void main(String[] args) { Struct1 struct1 = new Struct1(10, "abc"); byte[] data = fory.serializeJavaObject(struct1); Struct2 struct2 = (Struct2) fory.deserializeJavaObject(bytes, Struct2.class); } }

searchDocs.title: ί┐τώΑθί╝ΑίπΜέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: case class Person(name: String, id: Long, github: String) case class Point(x : Int, y : Int, z : Int) object ScalaExample { val fory: Fory = Fory.builder().withScalaOptimizationEnabled(true).build() // ό│ρίΗΝώΤΙίψ╣ Scala ϊ╝αίΝΨύγΕ fory ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρ ScalaSerializers.registerSerializers(fory) fory.register(classOf[Person]) fory.register(classOf[Point]) def main(args: Array[String]): Unit = { val p = Person("Shawn Yang", 1, "https://github.com/chaokunyang") println(fory.deserialize(fory.serialize(p))) println(fory.deserialize(fory.serialize(Point(1, 2, 3)))) } }

searchDocs.title: Fory ίχηϊ╛ΜίΙδί╗║έΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ίερϊ╜┐ύΦρ fory ϋ┐δϋκΝ Scala ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΩ╢Ύ╝Νί╗║ϋχχϋΘ│ί░Σϊ╗ξίοΓϊ╕ΜόΨ╣ί╝ΠίΙδί╗║ fory ίχηϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  import org.apache.fory.Fory import org.apache.fory.serializer.scala.ScalaSerializers val fory = Fory.builder().withScalaOptimizationEnabled(true).build() // ό│ρίΗΝώΤΙίψ╣ Scala ϊ╝αίΝΨύγΕ fory ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρ ScalaSerializers.registerSerializers(fory)   όι╣όΞχϊ╜ιώεΑϋοΒί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύγΕίψ╣ϋ▒κύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝίΠψϋΔ╜ϋ┐αώεΑϋοΒό│ρίΗΝϊ╕Αϊ║δ Scala ίΗΖώΔρύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝γ  fory.register(Class.forName("scala.Enumeration.Val"))   ίοΓόηεϊ╜ιί╕ΝόεδώΒ┐ίΖΞόΚΜίΛρό│ρίΗΝϋ┐βϊ║δύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝίΠψϊ╗ξώΑγϋ┐Θ ForyBuilder#requireClassRegistration(false) ίΖ│ώΩφύ▒╗ό│ρίΗΝίΛθϋΔ╜ήΑΓ ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γίΖ│ώΩφύ▒╗ό│ρίΗΝίΡΟΎ╝ΝίΠψϊ╗ξίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόεςύθξύ▒╗ίηΜύγΕίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝ΝύΒ╡ό┤╗όΑπόδ┤ώταΎ╝Νϊ╜ΗίοΓόηείΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύγΕύ▒╗ίΝΖίΡτόΒ╢όΕΠϊ╗μύιΒΎ╝ΝίΠψϋΔ╜ίφαίερίχΚίΖρώμΟώβσήΑΓ  Scala ϊ╕φί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρϋ╛Δϊ╕║ί╕╕ϋπΒΎ╝Νί╗║ϋχχώΑγϋ┐Θ ForyBuilder#withRefTracking(true) ίΡψύΦρί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςΎ╝ΙReference trackingΎ╝ΚήΑΓίοΓόηεόεςίΡψύΦρί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςΎ╝ΝίερόθΡϊ║δ Scala ύΚΙόευϊ╕Μί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ Scala Enumeration όΩ╢Ύ╝ΝίΠψϋΔ╜ϊ╝γίΘ║ύΟ░ StackOverflowErrorήΑΓ  ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γfory ίχηϊ╛Μί║Φίερίνγόυκί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΥΞϊ╜εώΩ┤ίνΞύΦρΎ╝Νfory ίχηϊ╛ΜύγΕίΙδί╗║ί╝ΑώΦΑϋ╛ΔίνπήΑΓ  ίοΓόηεϊ╜ιώεΑϋοΒίερίνγύ║┐ύρΜύΟψίλΔϊ╕ΜίΖ▒ϊ║τ fory ίχηϊ╛ΜΎ╝Νί║ΦώΑγϋ┐Θ ForyBuilder#buildThreadSafeFory() ίΙδί╗║ ThreadSafeFory ίχηϊ╛ΜήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ΏθΡΞ Python ίΟθύΦθί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: pyfory όΠΡϊ╛δϊ║Η Python ίΟθύΦθί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόρκί╝ΠΎ╝ΝόΠΡϊ╛δϊ╕Ο pickle/cloudpickle ύδ╕ίΡΝύγΕίΛθϋΔ╜Ύ╝Νϊ╜ΗίΖ╖όεΚόα╛ϋΣΩόδ┤ίξ╜ύγΕόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΒόδ┤ί░ΠύγΕόΧ░όΞχίνπί░ΠίΤΝίληί╝║ύγΕίχΚίΖρύΚ╣όΑπήΑΓ  ϊ║Νϋ┐δίΙ╢ίΞΠϋχχίΤΝ API ϊ╕Ο Fory ύγΕ xlang όρκί╝Πύ▒╗ϊ╝╝Ύ╝Νϊ╜Η Python ίΟθύΦθόρκί╝ΠίΠψϊ╗ξί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╗╗ϊ╜Χ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κέΑΦέΑΦίΝΖόΜυίΖρί▒ΑίΘ╜όΧ░ήΑΒί▒ΑώΔρίΘ╜όΧ░ήΑΒlambda ϋκρϋ╛╛ί╝ΠήΑΒί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗ϊ╗ξίΠΛϊ╜┐ύΦρ __getstate__/__reduce__/__reduce_ex__ ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝Νϋ┐βϊ║δίερ xlang όρκί╝Πϊ╕φόαψϊ╕ΞίΖΒϋχ╕ύγΕήΑΓ  ϋοΒϊ╜┐ύΦρ Python ίΟθύΦθόρκί╝ΠΎ╝Νϋψ╖ίΙδί╗║ xlang=False ύγΕ ForyήΑΓόφνόρκί╝ΠώΤΙίψ╣ύ║ψ Python ί║ΦύΦρύρΜί║Πϊ╝αίΝΨΎ╝γ  import pyfory fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=False, strict=True)

searchDocs.title: ίθ║ύκΑίψ╣ϋ▒κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╜┐ύΦρύχΑίΞΧύγΕ API ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΤΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κήΑΓόφνύν║ϊ╛Μί▒Χύν║ϊ║Ηί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΝΖίΡτό╖╖ίΡΙύ▒╗ίηΜύγΕίφΩίΖ╕Ύ╝γ  import pyfory # ίΙδί╗║ Fory ίχηϊ╛Μ fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=True) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╗╗ϊ╜Χ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κ data = fory.dumps({"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "scores": [95, 87, 92]}) # ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίδη Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κ obj = fory.loads(data) print(obj) # {'name': 'Alice', 'age': 30, 'scores': [95, 87, 92]}   ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γdumps()/loads() όαψ serialize()/deserialize() ύγΕίΙτίΡΞήΑΓϊ╕νύ╗Ε API ίχΝίΖρύδ╕ίΡΝΎ╝Νϊ╜┐ύΦρόΓρϋπΚί╛Ωόδ┤ύδ┤ϋπΓύγΕίΞ│ίΠψήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κύ▒╗ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Fory ϋΘςίΛρίνΕύΡΗ dataclass ίΤΝϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κύ▒╗ίηΜήΑΓό│ρίΗΝόΓρύγΕύ▒╗ϊ╕ΑόυκΎ╝ΝύΕ╢ίΡΟόΩιύ╝ζί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίχηϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  import pyfory from dataclasses import dataclass from typing import List, Dict @dataclass class Person: name: str age: int scores: List[int] metadata: Dict[str, str] # Python όρκί╝Π - όΦψόΝΒόΚΑόεΚ Python ύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝίΝΖόΜυ dataclass fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True) fory.register(Person) person = Person("Bob", 25, [88, 92, 85], {"team": "engineering"}) data = fory.serialize(person) result = fory.deserialize(data) print(result) # Person(name='Bob', age=25, ...)

searchDocs.title: Pickle/Cloudpickle ύγΕύδ┤όΟξόδ┐ϊ╗μίΥΒέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: pyfory ίΠψϊ╗ξϊ╜┐ύΦρϊ╗ξϊ╕ΜώΖΞύ╜χί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╗╗ϊ╜Χ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝γ  ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρΎ╝γϋχ╛ύ╜χ ref=True ίΡψύΦρί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςίΘ╜όΧ░/ύ▒╗Ύ╝γϋχ╛ύ╜χ strict=False ίΖΒϋχ╕ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΛρόΑΒύ▒╗ίηΜ  έγιΎ╕Π ίχΚίΖρϋφοίΣΛΎ╝γί╜Υ strict=False όΩ╢Ύ╝ΝFory ί░ΗίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╗╗όΕΠύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝίοΓόηεόΧ░όΞχόζξϋΘςϊ╕ΞίΠψϊ┐κόζξό║ΡΎ╝Νϋ┐βίΠψϋΔ╜ί╕οόζξίχΚίΖρώμΟώβσήΑΓϊ╗ΖίερόΓρίχΝίΖρϊ┐κϊ╗╗όΧ░όΞχό║ΡύγΕίΠΩόΟπύΟψίλΔϊ╕φϊ╜┐ύΦρ strict=FalseήΑΓίοΓόηεύκχίχηώεΑϋοΒϊ╜┐ύΦρ strict=FalseΎ╝Νϋψ╖ίερίΙδί╗║ fory όΩ╢ϊ╜┐ύΦρ policy=your_policy ώΖΞύ╜χ DeserializationPolicy όζξόΟπίΙ╢ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϋκΝϊ╕║ήΑΓ  ί╕╕ϋπΒύΦρό│ΧέΑΜ  ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╕╕ϋπΒύγΕ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝ΝίΝΖόΜυίφΩίΖ╕ήΑΒίΙΩϋκρίΤΝϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κύ▒╗Ύ╝ΝόΩιώεΑϊ╗╗ϊ╜Χό│ρίΗΝΎ╝γ  import pyfory # ίΙδί╗║ Fory ίχηϊ╛Μ fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╕╕ϋπΒύγΕ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κ data = fory.dumps({"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "scores": [95, 87, 92]}) print(fory.loads(data)) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κίψ╣ϋ▒κ from dataclasses import dataclass @dataclass class Person: name: str age: int person = Person("Bob", 25) data = fory.dumps(person) print(fory.loads(data)) # Person(name='Bob', age=25)   ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖρί▒ΑίΘ╜όΧ░έΑΜ  όΞΧϋΟ╖ίΤΝϋΟ╖ίΠΨίερόρκίζΩύ║πίΙτίχγϊ╣ΚύγΕίΘ╜όΧ░ήΑΓFory ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╣╢ϋ┐Φίδηύδ╕ίΡΝύγΕίΘ╜όΧ░ίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝γ  import pyfory # ίΙδί╗║ Fory ίχηϊ╛Μ fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖρί▒ΑίΘ╜όΧ░ def my_global_function(x): return 10 * x data = fory.dumps(my_global_function) print(fory.loads(data)(10)) # 100   ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί▒ΑώΔρίΘ╜όΧ░/Lambda ϋκρϋ╛╛ί╝ΠέΑΜ  ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╕οώΩφίΝΖύγΕίΘ╜όΧ░ίΤΝ lambda ϋκρϋ╛╛ί╝ΠήΑΓFory ϋΘςίΛρόΞΧϋΟ╖ώΩφίΝΖίΠαώΘΠΎ╝γ  import pyfory # ίΙδί╗║ Fory ίχηϊ╛Μ fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί╕οώΩφίΝΖύγΕί▒ΑώΔρίΘ╜όΧ░ def my_function(): local_var = 10 def local_func(x): return x * local_var return local_func data = fory.dumps(my_function()) print(fory.loads(data)(10)) # 100 # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ lambda ϋκρϋ╛╛ί╝Π data = fory.dumps(lambda x: 10 * x) print(fory.loads(data)(10)) # 100   ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖρί▒Αύ▒╗/όΨ╣ό│ΧέΑΜ  ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύ▒╗ίψ╣ϋ▒κήΑΒίχηϊ╛ΜόΨ╣ό│ΧήΑΒύ▒╗όΨ╣ό│ΧίΤΝώζβόΑΒόΨ╣ό│ΧήΑΓόΦψόΝΒόΚΑόεΚόΨ╣ό│Χύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝γ  from dataclasses import dataclass import pyfory fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖρί▒Αύ▒╗ @dataclass class Person: name: str age: int def f(self, x): return self.age * x @classmethod def g(cls, x): return 10 * x @staticmethod def h(x): return 10 * x print(fory.loads(fory.dumps(Person))("Bob", 25)) # Person(name='Bob', age=25) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖρί▒Αύ▒╗ίχηϊ╛ΜόΨ╣ό│Χ print(fory.loads(fory.dumps(Person("Bob", 20).f))(10)) # 200 # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖρί▒Αύ▒╗ύγΕύ▒╗όΨ╣ό│Χ print(fory.loads(fory.dumps(Person.g))(10)) # 100 # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΖρί▒Αύ▒╗ύγΕώζβόΑΒόΨ╣ό│Χ print(fory.loads(fory.dumps(Person.h))(10)) # 100   ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗/όΨ╣ό│ΧέΑΜ  ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΘ╜όΧ░ίΗΖίχγϊ╣ΚύγΕύ▒╗ίΠΛίΖ╢όΨ╣ό│ΧήΑΓώΑΓύΦρϊ║ΟίΛρόΑΒύ▒╗ίΙδί╗║Ύ╝γ  from dataclasses import dataclass import pyfory fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) def create_local_class(): class LocalClass: def f(self, x): return 10 * x @classmethod def g(cls, x): return 10 * x @staticmethod def h(x): return 10 * x return LocalClass # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗ data = fory.dumps(create_local_class()) print(fory.loads(data)().f(10)) # 100 # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗ίχηϊ╛ΜόΨ╣ό│Χ data = fory.dumps(create_local_class()().f) print(fory.loads(data)(10)) # 100 # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗ύγΕύ▒╗όΨ╣ό│Χ data = fory.dumps(create_local_class().g) print(fory.loads(data)(10)) # 100 # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗ύγΕώζβόΑΒόΨ╣ό│Χ data = fory.dumps(create_local_class().h) print(fory.loads(data)(10)) # 100

searchDocs.title: ί╕οίνΨύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Fory όΦψόΝΒίΖ╝ίχ╣ pickle5 ύγΕί╕οίνΨύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝ΝύΦρϊ║ΟώταόΧΙώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζίνΕύΡΗίνπίηΜόΧ░όΞχύ╗ΥόηΕήΑΓϋ┐βίψ╣ϊ║Ο NumPy όΧ░ύ╗ΕήΑΒPandas DataFrame ίΤΝίΖ╢ϊ╗ΨίΖ╖όεΚίνπίΗΖίφαίΞιύΦρύγΕίψ╣ϋ▒κύΚ╣ίΙτόεΚύΦρήΑΓ  ί╕οίνΨί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί░ΗίΖΔόΧ░όΞχϊ╕ΟίχηώβΖόΧ░όΞχύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ίΙΗύο╗Ύ╝Νϊ╗ΟϋΑΝίχηύΟ░Ύ╝γ  ϊ╜┐ύΦρ memoryview ώΑγϋ┐Θύ╜Σύ╗εόΙΨ IPC ίΠΣώΑΒόΧ░όΞχόΩ╢ώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζϊ╝ιϋ╛ΥίνπίηΜόΧ░όΞχώδΗύγΕόΑπϋΔ╜όΠΡίΞΘPickle5 ίΖ╝ίχ╣όΑπΎ╝Νϊ╜┐ύΦρ pickle.PickleBufferύΒ╡ό┤╗ύγΕό╡ΒόΦψόΝΒ - ίΗβίΖξϊ╗╗ϊ╜ΧίΠψίΗβίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝ΙόΨΘϊ╗╢ήΑΒBytesIOήΑΒίξΩόΟξίφΩύφΚΎ╝Κ  ίθ║ύκΑί╕οίνΨί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ  import pyfory import numpy as np fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=False, strict=False) # ίνπίηΜ numpy όΧ░ύ╗Ε array = np.arange(10000, dtype=np.float64) # ϊ╜┐ύΦρί╕οίνΨύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ buffer_objects = [] serialized_data = fory.serialize(array, buffer_callback=buffer_objects.append) # ί░Ηύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ίψ╣ϋ▒κϋ╜υόΞλϊ╕║ memoryview ϊ╗ξίχηύΟ░ώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζϊ╝ιϋ╛Υ # ίψ╣ϊ║Οϋ┐ηύ╗φύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║Ύ╝ΙbytesήΑΒnumpy όΧ░ύ╗ΕΎ╝ΚΎ╝Νϋ┐βόαψώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζύγΕ # ίψ╣ϊ║Οώζηϋ┐ηύ╗φόΧ░όΞχΎ╝ΝίΠψϋΔ╜ϊ╝γίΙδί╗║ίΚψόευϊ╗ξύκχϊ┐ζϋ┐ηύ╗φόΑπ buffers = [obj.getbuffer() for obj in buffer_objects] # ϊ╜┐ύΦρί╕οίνΨύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝ΙόΟξίΠΩ memoryviewήΑΒbytes όΙΨ BufferΎ╝Κ deserialized_array = fory.deserialize(serialized_data, buffers=buffers) assert np.array_equal(array, deserialized_array)   ί╕οίνΨί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ Pandas DataFrameέΑΜ  import pyfory import pandas as pd import numpy as np fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=False, strict=False) # ίΙδί╗║ίΝΖίΡτόΧ░ίΑ╝ίΙΩύγΕ DataFrame df = pd.DataFrame({ 'a': np.arange(1000, dtype=np.float64), 'b': np.arange(1000, dtype=np.int64), 'c': ['text'] * 1000 }) # ϊ╜┐ύΦρί╕οίνΨύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ buffer_objects = [] serialized_data = fory.serialize(df, buffer_callback=buffer_objects.append) buffers = [obj.getbuffer() for obj in buffer_objects] # ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ deserialized_df = fory.deserialize(serialized_data, buffers=buffers) assert df.equals(deserialized_df)   ώΑΚόΜσόΑπί╕οίνΨί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ  όΓρίΠψϊ╗ξώΑγϋ┐ΘόΠΡϊ╛δίδηϋ░ΔίΘ╜όΧ░όζξόΟπίΙ╢ίΥςϊ║δύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ϋ┐δϋκΝί╕οίνΨίνΕύΡΗΎ╝ΝϋψξίΘ╜όΧ░ϋ┐Φίδη True ί░ΗόΧ░όΞχϊ┐ζόΝΒίερί╕οίΗΖΎ╝Νϋ┐Φίδη FalseΎ╝Ιί╣╢ϋ┐╜ίΛιίΙ░ίΙΩϋκρΎ╝Κί░ΗίΖ╢ίΠΣώΑΒίΙ░ί╕οίνΨΎ╝γ  import pyfory import numpy as np fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) arr1 = np.arange(1000, dtype=np.float64) arr2 = np.arange(2000, dtype=np.float64) data = [arr1, arr2] buffer_objects = [] counter = 0 def selective_callback(buffer_object): global counter counter += 1 # ϊ╗Ζί░ΗίΒ╢όΧ░ύ╝ΨίΠ╖ύγΕύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ίΠΣώΑΒίΙ░ί╕οίνΨ if counter % 2 == 0: buffer_objects.append(buffer_object) return False # ί╕οίνΨ return True # ί╕οίΗΖ serialized = fory.serialize(data, buffer_callback=selective_callback) buffers = [obj.getbuffer() for obj in buffer_objects] deserialized = fory.deserialize(serialized, buffers=buffers)   Pickle5 ίΖ╝ίχ╣όΑπέΑΜ  Fory ύγΕί╕οίνΨί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╕Ο pickle protocol 5 ίχΝίΖρίΖ╝ίχ╣ήΑΓί╜Υίψ╣ϋ▒κίχηύΟ░ __reduce_ex__(protocol) όΩ╢Ύ╝ΝFory ϋΘςίΛρϊ╜┐ύΦρ protocol 5 όζξίΡψύΦρ pickle.PickleBuffer όΦψόΝΒΎ╝γ  import pyfory import pickle fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=False, strict=False) # ϋΘςίΛρόΦψόΝΒ PickleBuffer ίψ╣ϋ▒κ data = b"Large binary data" pickle_buffer = pickle.PickleBuffer(data) # ϊ╜┐ύΦρύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ίδηϋ░Δϋ┐δϋκΝί╕οίνΨίνΕύΡΗί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ buffer_objects = [] serialized = fory.serialize(pickle_buffer, buffer_callback=buffer_objects.append) buffers = [obj.getbuffer() for obj in buffer_objects] # ϊ╜┐ύΦρύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ deserialized = fory.deserialize(serialized, buffers=buffers) assert bytes(deserialized.raw()) == data   ί░Ηύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ίΗβίΖξϊ╕ΞίΡΝύγΕό╡ΒέΑΜ  BufferObject.write_to() όΨ╣ό│ΧόΟξίΠΩϊ╗╗ϊ╜ΧίΠψίΗβό╡Βίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝Νϊ╜┐ίΖ╢ώΑΓύΦρϊ║ΟίΡΕύπΞύΦρϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  import pyfory import numpy as np import io fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=False, strict=False) array = np.arange(1000, dtype=np.float64) # όΦ╢ώδΗί╕οίνΨύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║ buffer_objects = [] serialized = fory.serialize(array, buffer_callback=buffer_objects.append) # ίΗβίΖξϊ╕ΞίΡΝύγΕό╡Βύ▒╗ίηΜ for buffer_obj in buffer_objects: # ίΗβίΖξ BytesIOΎ╝ΙίΗΖίφαό╡ΒΎ╝Κ bytes_stream = io.BytesIO() buffer_obj.write_to(bytes_stream) # ίΗβίΖξόΨΘϊ╗╢ with open('/tmp/buffer_data.bin', 'wb') as f: buffer_obj.write_to(f) # ϋΟ╖ίΠΨώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζ memoryviewΎ╝Ιίψ╣ϊ║Οϋ┐ηύ╗φύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║Ύ╝Κ mv = buffer_obj.getbuffer() assert isinstance(mv, memoryview)   ό│ρόΕΠΎ╝γίψ╣ϊ║Οϋ┐ηύ╗φίΗΖίφαύ╝ΥίΗ▓ίΝ║Ύ╝ΙίοΓ bytesήΑΒnumpy όΧ░ύ╗ΕΎ╝ΚΎ╝Νgetbuffer() ϋ┐Φίδηώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζ memoryviewήΑΓίψ╣ϊ║Οώζηϋ┐ηύ╗φόΧ░όΞχΎ╝ΝίΠψϋΔ╜ϊ╝γίΙδί╗║ίΚψόευϊ╗ξύκχϊ┐ζϋ┐ηύ╗φόΑπήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ΏθΠΔέΑΞέβΓΎ╕Π ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίψ╣ϋ▒κίδ╛ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: pyfory όΦψόΝΒϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίψ╣ϋ▒κίδ╛ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝ΝίΖΒϋχ╕όΓρίερ Python ϊ╕φί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΧ░όΞχΎ╝ΝύΕ╢ίΡΟίερ JavaήΑΒGoήΑΒRust όΙΨίΖ╢ϊ╗ΨόΦψόΝΒύγΕϋψφϋρΑϊ╕φίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨήΑΓ  ϊ║Νϋ┐δίΙ╢ίΞΠϋχχίΤΝ API ϊ╕Ο pyfory ύγΕ python-native όρκί╝Πύ▒╗ϊ╝╝Ύ╝Νϊ╜Η Python ίΟθύΦθόρκί╝ΠίΠψϊ╗ξί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╗╗ϊ╜Χ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κέΑΦέΑΦίΝΖόΜυίΖρί▒ΑίΘ╜όΧ░ήΑΒί▒ΑώΔρίΘ╜όΧ░ήΑΒlambda ϋκρϋ╛╛ί╝ΠήΑΒί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗ϊ╗ξίΠΛϊ╜┐ύΦρ __getstate__/__reduce__/__reduce_ex__ ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝Νϋ┐βϊ║δίερ xlang όρκί╝Πϊ╕φόαψϊ╕ΞίΖΒϋχ╕ύγΕήΑΓ  ϋοΒϊ╜┐ύΦρ xlang όρκί╝ΠΎ╝Νϋψ╖ίΙδί╗║ xlang=True ύγΕ ForyήΑΓόφνόρκί╝ΠύΦρϊ║Ο xlang ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨί║ΦύΦρΎ╝γ  import pyfory fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=True, ref=False, strict=True)

searchDocs.title: ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ίερ Python ϊ╕φί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΧ░όΞχΎ╝ΝύΕ╢ίΡΟίερ JavaήΑΒGoήΑΒRust όΙΨίΖ╢ϊ╗ΨόΦψόΝΒύγΕϋψφϋρΑϊ╕φίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨήΑΓίΠΝόΨ╣ί┐Ζώκ╗ό│ρίΗΝύδ╕ίΡΝύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜί╣╢ϊ╜┐ύΦρίΝ╣ώΖΞύγΕίΡΞύπ░Ύ╝γ  Python (ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψ)  import pyfory # ύΦρϊ║Οϊ║ΤόΥΞϊ╜εόΑπύγΕϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝Π f = pyfory.Fory(xlang=True, ref=True) # ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗ίηΜϊ╗ξίχηύΟ░ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣ @dataclass class Person: name: str age: pyfory.int32 f.register(Person, typename="example.Person") person = Person("Charlie", 35) binary_data = f.serialize(person) # binary_data ύΟ░ίερίΠψϊ╗ξίΠΣώΑΒίΙ░ JavaήΑΒGo ύφΚ   Java (ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύτψ)  import org.apache.fory.*; public class Person { public String name; public int age; } Fory fory = Fory.builder() .withLanguage(Language.XLANG) .withRefTracking(true) .build(); fory.register(Person.class, "example.Person"); Person person = (Person) fory.deserialize(binaryData);

searchDocs.title: ΏθΥΛ ϋκΝόι╝ί╝Π - ώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζίνΕύΡΗέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Apache FuryέΕλ όΠΡϊ╛δϊ║Ηϊ╕ΑύπΞώγΠόε║ϋχ┐ώΩχϋκΝόι╝ί╝ΠΎ╝ΝόΩιώεΑίχΝίΖρίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΞ│ίΠψϊ╗Οϊ║Νϋ┐δίΙ╢όΧ░όΞχϊ╕φϋψ╗ίΠΨί╡ΝίξΩίφΩόχ╡ήΑΓϋ┐βίερίνΕύΡΗίνπίηΜίψ╣ϋ▒κόΩ╢Ύ╝Νί╜ΥίΠςώεΑϋοΒϋχ┐ώΩχώΔρίΙΗόΧ░όΞχόΩ╢Ύ╝ΝίνπίνπίΘΠί░Σϊ║Ηί╝ΑώΦΑήΑΓϋψξόι╝ί╝Πϋ┐αόΦψόΝΒίΗΖίφαόαιί░ΕόΨΘϊ╗╢Ύ╝ΝίχηύΟ░ϋ╢Ζϊ╜ΟίΗΖίφαίΞιύΦρήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ϋκΝόι╝ί╝Πίθ║ύκΑύΦρό│ΧέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ί░Ηίψ╣ϋ▒κύ╝ΨύιΒϊ╕║ϋκΝόι╝ί╝Πϊ╗ξίχηύΟ░ώγΠόε║ϋχ┐ώΩχΎ╝ΝόΩιώεΑίχΝίΖρίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨήΑΓώΑΓύΦρϊ║ΟίνπίηΜόΧ░όΞχώδΗΎ╝γ  Python  import pyfory import pyarrow as pa from dataclasses import dataclass from typing import List, Dict @dataclass class Bar: f1: str f2: List[pa.int64] @dataclass class Foo: f1: pa.int32 f2: List[pa.int32] f3: Dict[str, pa.int32] f4: List[Bar] # ίΙδί╗║ϋκΝόι╝ί╝Πύ╝ΨύιΒίβρ encoder = pyfory.encoder(Foo) # ίΙδί╗║ίνπίηΜόΧ░όΞχώδΗ foo = Foo( f1=10, f2=list(range(1_000_000)), f3={f"k{i}": i for i in range(1_000_000)}, f4=[Bar(f1=f"s{i}", f2=list(range(10))) for i in range(1_000_000)] ) # ύ╝ΨύιΒϊ╕║ϋκΝόι╝ί╝Π binary: bytes = encoder.to_row(foo).to_bytes() # ώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζϋχ┐ώΩχ - όΩιώεΑίχΝίΖρίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝Β foo_row = pyfory.RowData(encoder.schema, binary) print(foo_row.f2[100000]) # ύδ┤όΟξϋχ┐ώΩχύυυ 100,000 ϊ╕ςίΖΔύ┤ι print(foo_row.f4[100000].f1) # ύδ┤όΟξϋχ┐ώΩχί╡ΝίξΩίφΩόχ╡ print(foo_row.f4[200000].f2[5]) # ύδ┤όΟξϋχ┐ώΩχό╖▒ί║οί╡ΝίξΩίφΩόχ╡

searchDocs.title: ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣όΑπέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϋκΝόι╝ί╝ΠίΠψϊ╗ξϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑί╖ξϊ╜εήΑΓϊ╗ξϊ╕Μόαψίερ Java ϊ╕φϋχ┐ώΩχύδ╕ίΡΝόΧ░όΞχύ╗ΥόηΕύγΕύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  Java  public class Bar { String f1; List<Long> f2; } public class Foo { int f1; List<Integer> f2; Map<String, Integer> f3; List<Bar> f4; } RowEncoder<Foo> encoder = Encoders.bean(Foo.class); // ίΙδί╗║ίνπίηΜόΧ░όΞχώδΗ Foo foo = new Foo(); foo.f1 = 10; foo.f2 = IntStream.range(0, 1_000_000).boxed().collect(Collectors.toList()); foo.f3 = IntStream.range(0, 1_000_000).boxed().collect(Collectors.toMap(i -> "k" + i, i -> i)); List<Bar> bars = new ArrayList<>(1_000_000); for (int i = 0; i < 1_000_000; i++) { Bar bar = new Bar(); bar.f1 = "s" + i; bar.f2 = LongStream.range(0, 10).boxed().collect(Collectors.toList()); bars.add(bar); } foo.f4 = bars; // ύ╝ΨύιΒϊ╕║ϋκΝόι╝ί╝ΠΎ╝Ιϊ╕Ο Python ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣Ύ╝Κ BinaryRow binaryRow = encoder.toRow(foo); // ώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζώγΠόε║ϋχ┐ώΩχΎ╝ΝόΩιώεΑίχΝίΖρίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ BinaryArray f2Array = binaryRow.getArray(1); // ϋχ┐ώΩχ f2 ίΙΩϋκρ BinaryArray f4Array = binaryRow.getArray(3); // ϋχ┐ώΩχ f4 ίΙΩϋκρ BinaryRow bar10 = f4Array.getStruct(10); // ϋχ┐ώΩχύυυ 11 ϊ╕ς Bar long value = bar10.getArray(1).getInt64(5); // ϋχ┐ώΩχ bar.f2 ύγΕύυυ 6 ϊ╕ςίΖΔύ┤ι // ώΔρίΙΗίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ - ίΠςίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώεΑϋοΒύγΕίΗΖίχ╣ RowEncoder<Bar> barEncoder = Encoders.bean(Bar.class); Bar bar1 = barEncoder.fromRow(f4Array.getStruct(10)); // ϊ╗ΖίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύυυ 11 ϊ╕ς Bar Bar bar2 = barEncoder.fromRow(f4Array.getStruct(20)); // ϊ╗ΖίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύυυ 21 ϊ╕ς Bar // ώεΑϋοΒόΩ╢ϋ┐δϋκΝίχΝίΖρίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ Foo newFoo = encoder.fromRow(binaryRow);   C++  ίερ C++ ϊ╕φϊ╜┐ύΦρύ╝ΨϋψΣόΩ╢ύ▒╗ίηΜϊ┐κόΒψΎ╝γ  #include "fory/encoder/row_encoder.h" #include "fory/row/writer.h" struct Bar { std::string f1; std::vector<int64_t> f2; }; FORY_FIELD_INFO(Bar, f1, f2); struct Foo { int32_t f1; std::vector<int32_t> f2; std::map<std::string, int32_t> f3; std::vector<Bar> f4; }; FORY_FIELD_INFO(Foo, f1, f2, f3, f4); // ίΙδί╗║ίνπίηΜόΧ░όΞχώδΗ Foo foo; foo.f1 = 10; for (int i = 0; i < 1000000; i++) { foo.f2.push_back(i); foo.f3["k" + std::to_string(i)] = i; } for (int i = 0; i < 1000000; i++) { Bar bar; bar.f1 = "s" + std::to_string(i); for (int j = 0; j < 10; j++) { bar.f2.push_back(j); } foo.f4.push_back(bar); } // ύ╝ΨύιΒϊ╕║ϋκΝόι╝ί╝ΠΎ╝Ιϊ╕Ο Python/Java ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣Ύ╝Κ fory::encoder::RowEncoder<Foo> encoder; encoder.Encode(foo); auto row = encoder.GetWriter().ToRow(); // ώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζώγΠόε║ϋχ┐ώΩχΎ╝ΝόΩιώεΑίχΝίΖρίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ auto f2_array = row->GetArray(1); // ϋχ┐ώΩχ f2 ίΙΩϋκρ auto f4_array = row->GetArray(3); // ϋχ┐ώΩχ f4 ίΙΩϋκρ auto bar10 = f4_array->GetStruct(10); // ϋχ┐ώΩχύυυ 11 ϊ╕ς Bar int64_t value = bar10->GetArray(1)->GetInt64(5); // ϋχ┐ώΩχ bar.f2 ύγΕύυυ 6 ϊ╕ςίΖΔύ┤ι std::string str = bar10->GetString(0); // ϋχ┐ώΩχ bar.f1

searchDocs.title: ThreadSafeFory ύ▒╗έΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╜┐ύΦρύ║┐ύρΜόευίε░ίφαίΓρύγΕύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΟξίΠμΎ╝γ  class ThreadSafeFory: def __init__( self, xlang: bool = False, ref: bool = False, strict: bool = True, compatible: bool = False, max_depth: int = 50 )   ThreadSafeFory ώΑγϋ┐Θύ╗┤όΛνϊ╕Αϊ╕ςίΠΩώΦΒϊ┐ζόΛνύγΕ Fory ίχηϊ╛Μό▒ιόζξόΠΡϊ╛δύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρύγΕί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨήΑΓί╜Υύ║┐ύρΜώεΑϋοΒί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ/ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΩ╢Ύ╝ΝίχΔϊ╗Οό▒ιϊ╕φϋΟ╖ίΠΨϊ╕Αϊ╕ςίχηϊ╛ΜΎ╝Νϊ╜┐ύΦρίχΔΎ╝ΝύΕ╢ίΡΟί╜Τϋ┐αήΑΓόΚΑόεΚύ▒╗ίηΜό│ρίΗΝί┐Ζώκ╗ίερϊ╗╗ϊ╜Χί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╣ΜίΚΞίχΝόΙΡΎ╝Νϊ╗ξύκχϊ┐ζόΚΑόεΚίχηϊ╛Μϊ╣ΜώΩ┤ύγΕϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤όΑπήΑΓ  ύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γ  import pyfory import threading from dataclasses import dataclass @dataclass class Person: name: str age: int # ίΙδί╗║ύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρύγΕ Fory ίχηϊ╛Μ fory = pyfory.ThreadSafeFory(xlang=False, ref=True) fory.register(Person) # ίερίνγϊ╕ςύ║┐ύρΜϊ╕φίχΚίΖρϊ╜┐ύΦρ def serialize_in_thread(thread_id): person = Person(name=f"User{thread_id}", age=25 + thread_id) data = fory.serialize(person) result = fory.deserialize(data) print(f"Thread {thread_id}: {result}") threads = [threading.Thread(target=serialize_in_thread, args=(i,)) for i in range(10)] for t in threads: t.start() for t in threads: t.join()   ϊ╕╗ϋοΒύΚ╣όΑπΎ╝γ  ίχηϊ╛Μό▒ιΎ╝γύ╗┤όΛνϊ╕Αϊ╕ςίΠΩώΦΒϊ┐ζόΛνύγΕ Fory ίχηϊ╛Μό▒ιϊ╗ξίχηύΟ░ύ║┐ύρΜίχΚίΖρίΖ▒ϊ║τώΖΞύ╜χΎ╝γόΚΑόεΚό│ρίΗΝί┐Ζώκ╗ώλΕίΖΙίχΝόΙΡί╣╢ί║ΦύΦρϊ║ΟόΚΑόεΚίχηϊ╛Μύδ╕ίΡΝ APIΎ╝γϊ╕Ο Fory ύ▒╗ίΖ╖όεΚύδ╕ίΡΝόΨ╣ό│ΧύγΕύδ┤όΟξόδ┐ϊ╗μίΥΒό│ρίΗΝίχΚίΖρΎ╝γώα▓όφλώοΨόυκϊ╜┐ύΦρίΡΟό│ρίΗΝϊ╗ξύκχϊ┐ζϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤όΑπ  ϊ╜ΧόΩ╢ϊ╜┐ύΦρΎ╝γ  ίνγύ║┐ύρΜί║ΦύΦρΎ╝γWeb όεΞίΛκίβρήΑΒί╣╢ίΠΣί╖ξϊ╜εύ║┐ύρΜήΑΒί╣╢ϋκΝίνΕύΡΗίΖ▒ϊ║τ Fory ίχηϊ╛ΜΎ╝γί╜Υίνγϊ╕ςύ║┐ύρΜώεΑϋοΒί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ/ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΧ░όΞχόΩ╢ύ║┐ύρΜό▒ιΎ╝γϊ╜┐ύΦρύ║┐ύρΜό▒ιόΙΨ concurrent.futures ύγΕί║ΦύΦρύρΜί║Π  ίΠΓόΧ░Ύ╝γ  xlang (bool, ώ╗αϋχν=False)Ύ╝γίΡψύΦρϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨήΑΓί╜Υϊ╕║ False όΩ╢Ύ╝ΝίΡψύΦρόΦψόΝΒόΚΑόεΚ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κύγΕ Python ίΟθύΦθόρκί╝ΠήΑΓί╜Υϊ╕║ True όΩ╢Ύ╝ΝίΡψύΦρϊ╕Ο JavaήΑΒGoήΑΒRust ύφΚίΖ╝ίχ╣ύγΕϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝ΠήΑΓref (bool, ώ╗αϋχν=False)Ύ╝γίΡψύΦρίΖ▒ϊ║τ/ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρύγΕί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςήΑΓίοΓόηεόΓρύγΕόΧ░όΞχό▓κόεΚίΖ▒ϊ║τί╝ΧύΦρΎ╝ΝύοΒύΦρϊ╗ξϋΟ╖ί╛Ωόδ┤ίξ╜ύγΕόΑπϋΔ╜ήΑΓstrict (bool, ώ╗αϋχν=True)Ύ╝γϋοΒό▒Γύ▒╗ίηΜό│ρίΗΝϊ╗ξύκχϊ┐ζίχΚίΖρήΑΓί╝║ύΔΙί╗║ϋχχύΦρϊ║ΟύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔήΑΓϊ╗ΖίερίΠΩϊ┐κϊ╗╗ύγΕύΟψίλΔϊ╕φύοΒύΦρήΑΓcompatible (bool, ώ╗αϋχν=False)Ύ╝γίερϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝Πϊ╕ΜίΡψύΦρ schema ό╝ΦίΝΨΎ╝ΝίΖΒϋχ╕ίερϊ┐ζόΝΒίΖ╝ίχ╣όΑπύγΕίΡΝόΩ╢ό╖╗ίΛι/ίΙιώβνίφΩόχ╡ήΑΓmax_depth (int, ώ╗αϋχν=50)Ύ╝γίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύγΕόεΑίνπό╖▒ί║οΎ╝ΝύΦρϊ║ΟίχΚίΖρώα▓όΛνΎ╝Νώα▓όφλόιΙό║λίΘ║όΦ╗ίΘ╗ήΑΓ  ϊ╕╗ϋοΒόΨ╣ό│ΧΎ╝γ  # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨΎ╝Ιserialize/deserialize ϊ╕Ο dumps/loads ίχΝίΖρύδ╕ίΡΝΎ╝Κ data: bytes = fory.serialize(obj) obj = fory.deserialize(data) # όδ┐ϊ╗μ APIΎ╝ΙίΙτίΡΞΎ╝Κ data: bytes = fory.dumps(obj) obj = fory.loads(data) # ώΑγϋ┐Θ id ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΙύΦρϊ║Ο Python όρκί╝ΠΎ╝Κ fory.register(MyClass, type_id=123) fory.register(MyClass, type_id=123, serializer=custom_serializer) # ώΑγϋ┐ΘίΡΞύπ░ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΙύΦρϊ║Οϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝ΠΎ╝Κ fory.register(MyClass, typename="my.package.MyClass") fory.register(MyClass, typename="my.package.MyClass", serializer=custom_serializer)

searchDocs.title: ϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝Πίψ╣όψΦέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ύΚ╣όΑπ	Python όρκί╝Π (xlang=False)	ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝Π (xlang=True)ύΦρϊ╛Μ	ύ║ψ Python ί║ΦύΦρ	ίνγϋψφϋρΑύ│╗ύ╗θ ίΖ╝ίχ╣όΑπ	ϊ╗Ζ Python	JavaήΑΒGoήΑΒRustήΑΒC++ήΑΒJavaScript ύφΚ όΦψόΝΒύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜ	όΚΑόεΚ Python ύ▒╗ίηΜ	ϊ╗Ζϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣ύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜ ίΘ╜όΧ░/Lambda	έεΥ όΦψόΝΒ	έεΩ ϊ╕ΞίΖΒϋχ╕ ί▒ΑώΔρύ▒╗	έεΥ όΦψόΝΒ	έεΩ ϊ╕ΞίΖΒϋχ╕ ίΛρόΑΒύ▒╗	έεΥ όΦψόΝΒ	έεΩ ϊ╕ΞίΖΒϋχ╕ Schema ό╝ΦίΝΨ	έεΥ όΦψόΝΒΎ╝ΙίΡψύΦρ compatible=TrueΎ╝Κ	έεΥ όΦψόΝΒΎ╝ΙίΡψύΦρ compatible=TrueΎ╝Κ όΑπϋΔ╜	όηΒί┐τ	ώζηί╕╕ί┐τ όΧ░όΞχίνπί░Π	ύ┤πίΘΣ	ύ┤πίΘΣϊ╕ΦίΝΖίΡτύ▒╗ίηΜίΖΔόΧ░όΞχ  Python όρκί╝Π (xlang=False)έΑΜ  Python όρκί╝ΠόΦψόΝΒόΚΑόεΚ Python ύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝίΝΖόΜυίΘ╜όΧ░ήΑΒύ▒╗ίΤΝώΩφίΝΖήΑΓώζηί╕╕ώΑΓίΡΙύ║ψ Python ί║ΦύΦρΎ╝γ  import pyfory # ίχΝίΖρ Python ίΖ╝ίχ╣όρκί╝Π fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) # όΦψόΝΒόΚΑόεΚ Python ίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝γ data = fory.dumps({ 'function': lambda x: x * 2, # ίΘ╜όΧ░ίΤΝ lambda ϋκρϋ╛╛ί╝Π 'class': type('Dynamic', (), {}), # ίΛρόΑΒύ▒╗ 'method': str.upper, # όΨ╣ό│Χ 'nested': {'circular_ref': None} # ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρΎ╝Ιί╜Υ ref=True όΩ╢Ύ╝Κ }) # pickle/cloudpickle ύγΕύδ┤όΟξόδ┐ϊ╗μίΥΒ import pickle obj = [1, 2, {"nested": [3, 4]}] assert fory.loads(fory.dumps(obj)) == pickle.loads(pickle.dumps(obj)) # όψΦ pickle όα╛ϋΣΩόδ┤ί┐τόδ┤ύ┤πίΘΣ import timeit obj = {f"key{i}": f"value{i}" for i in range(10000)} print(f"Fory: {timeit.timeit(lambda: fory.dumps(obj), number=1000):.3f}s") print(f"Pickle: {timeit.timeit(lambda: pickle.dumps(obj), number=1000):.3f}s")   ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝Π (xlang=True)έΑΜ  ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝Πί░Ηύ▒╗ίηΜώβΡίΙ╢ϊ╕║όΚΑόεΚ Fory ίχηύΟ░ώΑγύΦρύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜήΑΓύΦρϊ║ΟίνγϋψφϋρΑύ│╗ύ╗θΎ╝γ  import pyfory # ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣όρκί╝Π f = pyfory.Fory(xlang=True, ref=True) # ϊ╗ΖόΦψόΝΒϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣ύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜ f.register(MyDataClass, typename="com.example.MyDataClass") # όΧ░όΞχίΠψϊ╗ξϋλτ JavaήΑΒGoήΑΒRust ύφΚϋψ╗ίΠΨ data = f.serialize(MyDataClass(field1="value", field2=42))

searchDocs.title: ί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςίΤΝί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ίχΚίΖρίνΕύΡΗίΖ▒ϊ║τί╝ΧύΦρίΤΝί╛ςύΟψϊ╛ζϋ╡ΨήΑΓϋχ╛ύ╜χ ref=True όζξίΟ╗ώΘΞίψ╣ϋ▒κΎ╝γ  import pyfory f = pyfory.Fory(ref=True) # ίΡψύΦρί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ς # ίχΚίΖρίνΕύΡΗί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρ class Node: def __init__(self, value): self.value = value self.children = [] self.parent = None root = Node("root") child = Node("child") child.parent = root # ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρ root.children.append(child) # ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╕Ξϊ╝γόΩιώβΡώΑΤί╜Τ data = f.serialize(root) result = f.deserialize(data) assert result.children[0].parent is result # ί╝ΧύΦρϋλτϊ┐ζύΧβ

searchDocs.title: ύ▒╗ίηΜό│ρίΗΝίΤΝίχΚίΖρέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ίερϊ╕ξόι╝όρκί╝Πϊ╕ΜΎ╝ΝίΠςόεΚό│ρίΗΝύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜόΚΞϋΔ╜ϋλτίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨήΑΓϋ┐βίΠψϊ╗ξώα▓όφλϊ╗╗όΕΠϊ╗μύιΒόΚπϋκΝΎ╝γ  import pyfory # ϊ╕ξόι╝όρκί╝ΠΎ╝ΙόΟρϋΞΡύΦρϊ║ΟύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔΎ╝Κ f = pyfory.Fory(strict=True) class SafeClass: def __init__(self, data): self.data = data # ίερϊ╕ξόι╝όρκί╝Πϊ╕Μί┐Ζώκ╗ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗ίηΜ f.register(SafeClass, typename="com.example.SafeClass") # ύΟ░ίερί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΠψϊ╗ξί╖ξϊ╜ε obj = SafeClass("safe data") data = f.serialize(obj) result = f.deserialize(data) # όεςό│ρίΗΝύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜί░Ηί╝ΧίΠΣί╝Γί╕╕ class UnsafeClass: pass # ίερϊ╕ξόι╝όρκί╝Πϊ╕Μϋ┐βί░Ηίν▒ϋ┤ξ try: f.serialize(UnsafeClass()) except Exception as e: print("ίχΚίΖρϊ┐ζόΛνί╖▓ίΡψίΛρΎ╝Β")

searchDocs.title: ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╕║ύΚ╣όχΛύ▒╗ίηΜίχηύΟ░ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΑ╗ϋ╛ΣήΑΓϋοΗύδΨ write/read ύΦρϊ║Ο Python όρκί╝ΠΎ╝Νxwrite/xread ύΦρϊ║Οϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑΎ╝γ  import pyfory from pyfory.serializer import Serializer from dataclasses import dataclass @dataclass class Foo: f1: int f2: str class FooSerializer(Serializer): def __init__(self, fory, cls): super().__init__(fory, cls) def write(self, buffer, obj: Foo): # ϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΑ╗ϋ╛Σ buffer.write_varint32(obj.f1) buffer.write_string(obj.f2) def read(self, buffer): # ϋΘςίχγϊ╣ΚίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΑ╗ϋ╛Σ f1 = buffer.read_varint32() f2 = buffer.read_string() return Foo(f1, f2) # ύΦρϊ║Οϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόρκί╝Π def xwrite(self, buffer, obj: Foo): buffer.write_int32(obj.f1) buffer.write_string(obj.f2) def xread(self, buffer): return Foo(buffer.read_int32(), buffer.read_string()) f = pyfory.Fory() f.register(Foo, type_id=100, serializer=FooSerializer(f, Foo)) # ύΟ░ίερ Foo ϊ╜┐ύΦρόΓρύγΕϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρ data = f.dumps(Foo(42, "hello")) result = f.loads(data) print(result) # Foo(f1=42, f2='hello')

searchDocs.title: Numpy ίΤΝύπΣίφοϋχκύχΩέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Fory ίΟθύΦθόΦψόΝΒ numpy όΧ░ύ╗ΕΎ╝Νϊ╜┐ύΦρϊ╝αίΝΨύγΕί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨήΑΓίνπίηΜόΧ░ύ╗ΕίερίΠψϋΔ╜ύγΕόΔΖίΗ╡ϊ╕Μϊ╜┐ύΦρώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζΎ╝γ  import pyfory import numpy as np f = pyfory.Fory() # ίΟθύΦθόΦψόΝΒ Numpy όΧ░ύ╗Ε arrays = { 'matrix': np.random.rand(1000, 1000), 'vector': np.arange(10000), 'bool_mask': np.random.choice([True, False], size=5000) } data = f.serialize(arrays) result = f.deserialize(data) # ίψ╣ϊ║ΟίΖ╝ίχ╣ύγΕόΧ░ύ╗Εύ▒╗ίηΜϊ╜┐ύΦρώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζ assert np.array_equal(arrays['matrix'], result['matrix'])

searchDocs.title: ύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔώΖΞύ╜χέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╜┐ύΦρϋ┐βϊ║δόΟρϋΞΡϋχ╛ύ╜χίερύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔϊ╕φί╣│ϋκκίχΚίΖρόΑπήΑΒόΑπϋΔ╜ίΤΝίΛθϋΔ╜Ύ╝γ  import pyfory # ύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔόΟρϋΞΡϋχ╛ύ╜χ fory = pyfory.Fory( xlang=False, # ίοΓόηεώεΑϋοΒϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑόΦψόΝΒίΙβϊ╜┐ύΦρ True ref=False, # ίοΓόηεόεΚίΖ▒ϊ║τ/ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρίΙβίΡψύΦρ strict=True, # ίΖ│ώΦχΎ╝γύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔϊ╕φίπΜύ╗Ιϊ╕║ True compatible=False, # ϊ╗ΖίερώεΑϋοΒ schema ό╝ΦίΝΨόΩ╢ίΡψύΦρ max_depth=20 # όι╣όΞχόΧ░όΞχύ╗ΥόηΕό╖▒ί║οϋ░ΔόΧ┤ ) # ώλΕίΖΙό│ρίΗΝόΚΑόεΚύ▒╗ίηΜ fory.register(UserModel, type_id=100) fory.register(OrderModel, type_id=101) fory.register(ProductModel, type_id=102)

searchDocs.title: όΑπϋΔ╜ϊ╝αίΝΨόΛΑί╖πέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╜┐ύΦρϋ┐βϊ║δόΝΘίΞΩϊ╝αίΝΨί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΑθί║οίΤΝίΗΖίφαϊ╜┐ύΦρΎ╝γ  ίοΓόηεϊ╕ΞώεΑϋοΒίΙβύοΒύΦρ ref=TrueΎ╝γί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ςόεΚί╝ΑώΦΑϊ╜┐ύΦρ type_id ϋΑΝϊ╕Ξόαψ typenameΎ╝γόΧ┤όΧ░ ID όψΦίφΩύυοϊ╕▓ίΡΞύπ░όδ┤ί┐τίνΞύΦρ Fory ίχηϊ╛ΜΎ╝γίΙδί╗║ϊ╕ΑόυκΎ╝Νίνγόυκϊ╜┐ύΦρίΡψύΦρ CythonΎ╝γύκχϊ┐ζ ENABLE_FORY_CYTHON_SERIALIZATION=1Ύ╝Νί║Φώ╗αϋχνίΡψύΦρίψ╣ίνπίηΜόΧ░ύ╗Εϊ╜┐ύΦρϋκΝόι╝ί╝ΠΎ╝γύΦρϊ║ΟίΙΗόηΡύγΕώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζϋχ┐ώΩχ  # ίξ╜ύγΕίΒγό│ΧΎ╝γίνΞύΦρίχηϊ╛Μ fory = pyfory.Fory() for obj in objects: data = fory.dumps(obj) # ϊ╕Ξίξ╜ύγΕίΒγό│ΧΎ╝γόψΠόυκίΙδί╗║όΨ░ίχηϊ╛Μ for obj in objects: fory = pyfory.Fory() # ό╡ςϋ┤╣Ύ╝Β data = fory.dumps(obj)

searchDocs.title: ύ▒╗ίηΜό│ρίΗΝόρκί╝ΠέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╕║όΓρύγΕύΦρϊ╛ΜώΑΚόΜσόφμύκχύγΕό│ρίΗΝόΨ╣ό│ΧΎ╝γ  # όρκί╝Π 1Ύ╝γύχΑίΞΧό│ρίΗΝ fory.register(MyClass, type_id=100) # όρκί╝Π 2Ύ╝γϊ╜┐ύΦρ typename ύγΕϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑ fory.register(MyClass, typename="com.example.MyClass") # όρκί╝Π 3Ύ╝γϊ╜┐ύΦρϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίβρ fory.register(MyClass, type_id=100, serializer=MySerializer(fory, MyClass)) # όρκί╝Π 4Ύ╝γόΚ╣ώΘΠό│ρίΗΝ type_id = 100 for model_class in [User, Order, Product, Invoice]: fory.register(model_class, type_id=type_id) type_id += 1

searchDocs.title: ώΦβϋψψίνΕύΡΗέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╝αώδΖίε░ίνΕύΡΗί╕╕ϋπΒύγΕί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΦβϋψψήΑΓόΞΧϋΟ╖ύΚ╣ίχγί╝Γί╕╕ϊ╗ξίχηύΟ░όδ┤ίξ╜ύγΕώΦβϋψψόΒλίνΞΎ╝γ  import pyfory from pyfory.error import TypeUnregisteredError, TypeNotCompatibleError fory = pyfory.Fory(strict=True) try: data = fory.dumps(my_object) except TypeUnregisteredError as e: print(f"ύ▒╗ίηΜόεςό│ρίΗΝΎ╝γ{e}") # ό│ρίΗΝύ▒╗ίηΜί╣╢ώΘΞϋψΧ fory.register(type(my_object), type_id=100) data = fory.dumps(my_object) except Exception as e: print(f"ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίν▒ϋ┤ξΎ╝γ{e}") try: obj = fory.loads(data) except TypeNotCompatibleError as e: print(f"Schema ϊ╕ΞίΝ╣ώΖΞΎ╝γ{e}") # ίνΕύΡΗύΚΙόευϊ╕ΞίΝ╣ώΖΞ except Exception as e: print(f"ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίν▒ϋ┤ξΎ╝γ{e}")

searchDocs.title: ϊ╗Ο Pickle ϋ┐Βύπ╗έΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ύΦρ Fory όδ┐όΞλ pickle ϊ╗ξϋΟ╖ί╛Ωόδ┤ίξ╜ύγΕόΑπϋΔ╜Ύ╝ΝίΡΝόΩ╢ϊ┐ζόΝΒύδ╕ίΡΝύγΕ APIΎ╝γ  # ϊ╣ΜίΚΞΎ╝ΙpickleΎ╝Κ import pickle data = pickle.dumps(obj) result = pickle.loads(data) # ϊ╣ΜίΡΟΎ╝ΙFory - ίΖ╖όεΚόδ┤ίξ╜όΑπϋΔ╜ύγΕύδ┤όΟξόδ┐ϊ╗μίΥΒΎ╝Κ import pyfory f = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False) data = f.dumps(obj) # όδ┤ί┐τόδ┤ύ┤πίΘΣ result = f.loads(data) # όδ┤ί┐τύγΕίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ # ϊ╝αίΛ┐Ύ╝γ # - ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΑθί║οί┐τ 2-10 ίΑΞ # - ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨώΑθί║οί┐τ 2-5 ίΑΞ # - όΧ░όΞχίνπί░ΠόεΑίνγίΘΠί░Σ 3 ίΑΞ # - ύδ╕ίΡΝύγΕ APIΎ╝Νόδ┤ίξ╜ύγΕόΑπϋΔ╜

searchDocs.title: ϊ╗Ο JSON ϋ┐Βύπ╗έΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╕Ο JSON ϊ╕ΞίΡΝΎ╝ΝFory όΦψόΝΒϊ╗╗όΕΠ Python ύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝ΝίΝΖόΜυίΘ╜όΧ░Ύ╝γ  # ϊ╣ΜίΚΞΎ╝ΙJSON - ύ▒╗ίηΜόεΚώβΡΎ╝Κ import json data = json.dumps({"name": "Alice", "age": 30}) result = json.loads(data) # ϊ╣ΜίΡΟΎ╝ΙFory - όΚΑόεΚ Python ύ▒╗ίηΜΎ╝Κ import pyfory f = pyfory.Fory() data = f.dumps({"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "func": lambda x: x}) result = f.loads(data)

searchDocs.title: ύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔώΖΞύ╜χέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ώβνώζηόΓρύγΕύΟψίλΔίχΝίΖρίΠψϊ┐κΎ╝ΝίΡοίΙβϊ╕ΞϋοΒίερύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔϊ╕φύοΒύΦρ strict=TrueΎ╝γ  import pyfory # όΟρϋΞΡύγΕύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔϋχ╛ύ╜χ f = pyfory.Fory( xlang=False, # όΙΨ True ύΦρϊ║Οϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑ ref=True, # ίνΕύΡΗί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρ strict=True, # ώΘΞϋοΒΎ╝γώα▓όφλόΒ╢όΕΠόΧ░όΞχ max_depth=100 # ώα▓όφλό╖▒ί║οώΑΤί╜ΤόΦ╗ίΘ╗ ) # όα╛ί╝Πό│ρίΗΝίΖΒϋχ╕ύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜ f.register(UserModel, type_id=100) f.register(OrderModel, type_id=101) # ύ╗ζϊ╕ΞϋοΒίερίνΕύΡΗϊ╕ΞίΠψϊ┐κόΧ░όΞχύγΕύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔϊ╕φϋχ╛ύ╜χ strict=FalseΎ╝Β

searchDocs.title: ί╝ΑίΠΣϊ╕ΟύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ϊ╜┐ύΦρύΟψίλΔίΠαώΘΠίερί╝ΑίΠΣίΤΝύΦθϊ║πώΖΞύ╜χϊ╣ΜώΩ┤ίΙΘόΞλΎ╝γ  import pyfory import os # ί╝ΑίΠΣώΖΞύ╜χ if os.getenv('ENV') == 'development': fory = pyfory.Fory( xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False, # ί╝ΑίΠΣόΩ╢ίΖΒϋχ╕ϊ╗╗ϊ╜Χύ▒╗ίηΜ max_depth=1000 # ί╝ΑίΠΣόΩ╢όδ┤ώταύγΕώβΡίΙ╢ ) else: # ύΦθϊ║πώΖΞύ╜χΎ╝ΙίχΚίΖρίΛιίδ║Ύ╝Κ fory = pyfory.Fory( xlang=False, ref=True, strict=True, # ίΖ│ώΦχΎ╝γώεΑϋοΒό│ρίΗΝ max_depth=100 # ίΡΙύΡΗύγΕώβΡίΙ╢ ) # ϊ╗Ζό│ρίΗΝί╖▓ύθξύγΕίχΚίΖρύ▒╗ίηΜ for idx, model_class in enumerate([UserModel, ProductModel, OrderModel]): fory.register(model_class, type_id=100 + idx)

searchDocs.title: DeserializationPolicyέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: ί╜Υί┐Ζώκ╗ϊ╜┐ύΦρ strict=False όΩ╢Ύ╝Ιϊ╛ΜίοΓΎ╝ΝίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΘ╜όΧ░/lambda ϋκρϋ╛╛ί╝ΠΎ╝ΚΎ╝Νϊ╜┐ύΦρ DeserializationPolicy ίερίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόεθώΩ┤ίχηύΟ░ύ╗Ηύ▓Τί║ούγΕίχΚίΖρόΟπίΙ╢ήΑΓϋ┐βόΠΡϊ╛δϊ║Ηύ▒╗ϊ╝╝ϊ║Ο pickle.Unpickler.find_class() ύγΕϊ┐ζόΛνΎ╝Νϊ╜ΗίΖ╖όεΚόδ┤ίΖρώζλύγΕώΤσίφΡήΑΓ  ϊ╕║ϊ╗Αϊ╣Ιϊ╜┐ύΦρ DeserializationPolicyΎ╝θ  ώα╗όφλίΞ▒ώβσύγΕύ▒╗/όρκίζΩΎ╝Ιϊ╛ΜίοΓΎ╝Νsubprocess.PopenΎ╝Κίερϋ░ΔύΦρϊ╣ΜίΚΞόΜοόΙςίΤΝώςΝϋψΒ __reduce__ ίΠψϋ░ΔύΦρίψ╣ϋ▒κίερ __setstate__ όεθώΩ┤ό╕ΖύΡΗόΧΠόΕθόΧ░όΞχόι╣όΞχϋΘςίχγϊ╣ΚϋπΕίΙβόδ┐όΞλόΙΨόΜΤύ╗ζίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨύγΕίψ╣ϋ▒κ  ύν║ϊ╛ΜΎ╝γώα╗όφλίΞ▒ώβσύγΕύ▒╗  import pyfory from pyfory import DeserializationPolicy dangerous_modules = {'subprocess', 'os', '__builtin__'} class SafeDeserializationPolicy(DeserializationPolicy): """ίερίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόεθώΩ┤ώα╗όφλό╜είερίΞ▒ώβσύγΕύ▒╗ήΑΓ""" def validate_class(self, cls, is_local, **kwargs): # ώα╗όφλίΞ▒ώβσόρκίζΩ if cls.__module__ in dangerous_modules: raise ValueError(f"ώα╗όφλίΞ▒ώβσύ▒╗Ύ╝γ{cls.__module__}.{cls.__name__}") return None def intercept_reduce_call(self, callable_obj, args, **kwargs): # ίερ __reduce__ όεθώΩ┤ώα╗όφλύΚ╣ίχγύγΕίΠψϋ░ΔύΦρίψ╣ϋ▒κϋ░ΔύΦρ if getattr(callable_obj, '__name__', "") == 'Popen': raise ValueError("ώα╗όφλί░ζϋψΧϋ░ΔύΦρ subprocess.Popen") return None def intercept_setstate(self, obj, state, **kwargs): # ό╕ΖύΡΗόΧΠόΕθόΧ░όΞχ if isinstance(state, dict) and 'password' in state: state['password'] = '***REDACTED***' return None # ϊ╜┐ύΦρϋΘςίχγϊ╣ΚίχΚίΖρύφΨύΧξίΙδί╗║ Fory policy = SafeDeserializationPolicy() fory = pyfory.Fory(xlang=False, ref=True, strict=False, policy=policy) # ύΟ░ίερίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΠΩίΙ░όΓρϋΘςίχγϊ╣ΚύφΨύΧξύγΕϊ┐ζόΛν data = fory.serialize(my_object) result = fory.deserialize(data) # ί░Ηϋ░ΔύΦρύφΨύΧξώΤσίφΡ   ίΠψύΦρύγΕύφΨύΧξώΤσίφΡΎ╝γ  validate_class(cls, is_local) - ίερίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόεθώΩ┤ώςΝϋψΒ/ώα╗όφλύ▒╗ύ▒╗ίηΜvalidate_module(module, is_local) - ώςΝϋψΒ/ώα╗όφλόρκίζΩίψ╝ίΖξvalidate_function(func, is_local) - ώςΝϋψΒ/ώα╗όφλίΘ╜όΧ░ί╝ΧύΦρintercept_reduce_call(callable_obj, args) - όΜοόΙς __reduce__ ϋ░ΔύΦρinspect_reduced_object(obj) - όμΑόθξ/όδ┐όΞλώΑγϋ┐Θ __reduce__ ίΙδί╗║ύγΕίψ╣ϋ▒κintercept_setstate(obj, state) - ίερ __setstate__ ϊ╣ΜίΚΞόμΑόθξύΛ╢όΑΒauthorize_instantiation(cls, args, kwargs) - όΟπίΙ╢ύ▒╗ίχηϊ╛ΜίΝΨ  ίΠοϋπΒΎ╝γ pyfory/policy.py ίΝΖίΡτόψΠϊ╕ςhookύγΕϋψού╗ΗόΨΘόκμίΤΝύν║ϊ╛ΜήΑΓ

searchDocs.title: ί╕╕ϋπΒώΩχώλαέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Q: όι╝ί╝ΠίΛθϋΔ╜ύγΕ ImportError  # A: ίχΚϋμΖϋκΝόι╝ί╝ΠόΦψόΝΒ pip install pyfory[format] # όΙΨϊ╗Οό║ΡύιΒίχΚϋμΖί╣╢όΦψόΝΒόι╝ί╝ΠίΛθϋΔ╜ pip install -e ".[format]"   Q: ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΑπϋΔ╜όΖλ  # A: όμΑόθξόαψίΡοίΡψύΦρϊ║Η Cython ίΛιώΑθ import pyfory print(pyfory.ENABLE_FORY_CYTHON_SERIALIZATION) # ί║Φϋψξϊ╕║ True # ίοΓόηεϊ╕║ FalseΎ╝ΝCython όΚσί▒ΧίΠψϋΔ╜όεςόφμύκχύ╝ΨϋψΣ # ϊ╜┐ύΦρϊ╗ξϊ╕ΜίΣ╜ϊ╗νώΘΞόΨ░ίχΚϋμΖΎ╝γpip install --force-reinstall --no-cache-dir pyfory # ίψ╣ϊ║Οϋ░ΔϋψΧΎ╝ΝόΓρίΠψϊ╗ξίερίψ╝ίΖξίΚΞύοΒύΦρ Cython όρκί╝Π import os os.environ['ENABLE_FORY_CYTHON_SERIALIZATION'] = '0' import pyfory # ύΟ░ίερϊ╜┐ύΦρύ║ψ Python όρκί╝Π   Q: ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑίΖ╝ίχ╣όΑπώΩχώλα  # A: ϊ╜┐ύΦρόα╛ί╝Πύ▒╗ίηΜό│ρίΗΝίΤΝϊ╕ΑϋΘ┤ύγΕίΣ╜ίΡΞ f = pyfory.Fory(xlang=True) f.register(MyClass, typename="com.package.MyClass") # ίερόΚΑόεΚϋψφϋρΑϊ╕φϊ╜┐ύΦρύδ╕ίΡΝύγΕίΡΞύπ░   Q: ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρώΦβϋψψόΙΨώΘΞίνΞόΧ░όΞχ  # A: ίΡψύΦρί╝ΧύΦρϋ╖θϋ╕ς f = pyfory.Fory(ref=True) # ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρί┐ΖώεΑ # ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρύν║ϊ╛Μ class Node: def __init__(self, value): self.value = value self.next = None node1 = Node(1) node2 = Node(2) node1.next = node2 node2.next = node1 # ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρ data = f.dumps(node1) result = f.loads(data) assert result.next.next is result # ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρϋλτϊ┐ζύΧβ

searchDocs.title: ϋ░ΔϋψΧόρκί╝ΠέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: # ίερίψ╝ίΖξ pyfory ϊ╣ΜίΚΞϋχ╛ύ╜χύΟψίλΔίΠαώΘΠϊ╗ξύοΒύΦρ Cython ϋ┐δϋκΝϋ░ΔϋψΧ import os os.environ['ENABLE_FORY_CYTHON_SERIALIZATION'] = '0' import pyfory # ύΟ░ίερϊ╜┐ύΦρύ║ψ Python ίχηύΟ░ # ϋ┐βίψ╣ϊ╗ξϊ╕ΜόΔΖίΗ╡ί╛ΙόεΚύΦρΎ╝γ # 1. ϋ░ΔϋψΧίΞΠϋχχώΩχώλα # 2. ύΡΗϋπμί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϋκΝϊ╕║ # 3. όΩιώεΑώΘΞόΨ░ύ╝ΨϋψΣ Cython ϋ┐δϋκΝί╝ΑίΠΣ   Q: Schema ό╝ΦίΝΨϊ╕Ξϋ╡╖ϊ╜εύΦρ  # A: ϊ╕║ schema ό╝ΦίΝΨίΡψύΦρίΖ╝ίχ╣όρκί╝Π f = pyfory.Fory(xlang=True, compatible=True) # ύΚΙόευ 1Ύ╝γίΟθίπΜύ▒╗ @dataclass class User: name: str age: int f.register(User, typename="User") data = f.dumps(User("Alice", 30)) # ύΚΙόευ 2Ύ╝γό╖╗ίΛιόΨ░ίφΩόχ╡Ύ╝ΙίΡΣίΡΟίΖ╝ίχ╣Ύ╝Κ @dataclass class User: name: str age: int email: str = "unknown@example.com" # ί╕οώ╗αϋχνίΑ╝ύγΕόΨ░ίφΩόχ╡ # ϊ╗ΞύΕ╢ίΠψϊ╗ξίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΩπόΧ░όΞχ user = f.loads(data) print(user.email) # "unknown@example.com"   Q: ϊ╕ξόι╝όρκί╝Πϊ╕ΜύγΕύ▒╗ίηΜό│ρίΗΝώΦβϋψψ  # A: ίερί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨϊ╣ΜίΚΞό│ρίΗΝόΚΑόεΚϋΘςίχγϊ╣Κύ▒╗ίηΜ f = pyfory.Fory(strict=True) # ϊ╜┐ύΦρίΚΞί┐Ζώκ╗ό│ρίΗΝ f.register(MyClass, type_id=100) f.register(AnotherClass, type_id=101) # όΙΨύοΒύΦρϊ╕ξόι╝όρκί╝ΠΎ╝Ιϊ╕ΞόΟρϋΞΡύΦρϊ║ΟύΦθϊ║πύΟψίλΔΎ╝Κ f = pyfory.Fory(strict=False) # ϊ╗ΖίερίΠΩϊ┐κϊ╗╗ύγΕύΟψίλΔϊ╕φϊ╜┐ύΦρ

searchDocs.title: Ώθνζ ϋ┤κύΝχέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: Apache ForyέΕλ όαψ Apache ϋ╜ψϊ╗╢ίθ║ώΘΣϊ╝γϊ╕ΜύγΕί╝Αό║Ρώκ╣ύδχήΑΓόΙΣϊ╗υόυλϋ┐ΟόΚΑόεΚί╜λί╝ΠύγΕϋ┤κύΝχΎ╝γ

searchDocs.title: ίοΓϊ╜Χϋ┤κύΝχέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: όΛξίΣΛώΩχώλαΎ╝γίΠΣύΟ░ bugΎ╝θόΠΡϊ║ν issueί╗║ϋχχίΛθϋΔ╜Ύ╝γόεΚόΔ│ό│ΧΎ╝θί╝ΑίπΜϋχρϋχ║όΦ╣ϋ┐δόΨΘόκμΎ╝γόΨΘόκμόΦ╣ϋ┐δόΑ╗όαψίΠΩόυλϋ┐ΟύγΕόΠΡϊ║νϊ╗μύιΒΎ╝γϋψ╖όθξύεΜόΙΣϊ╗υύγΕϋ┤κύΝχόΝΘίΞΩ

searchDocs.title: ί╝ΑίΠΣύΟψίλΔϋχ╛ύ╜χέΑΜ
searchDocs.content: git clone https://github.com/apache/fory.git cd fory/python # ίχΚϋμΖϊ╛ζϋ╡Ψ pip install -e ".[dev,format]" # ϋ┐ΡϋκΝό╡ΜϋψΧ pytest -v -s . # ϋ┐ΡϋκΝύΚ╣ίχγό╡ΜϋψΧ pytest -v -s pyfory/tests/test_serializer.py # όι╝ί╝ΠίΝΨϊ╗μύιΒ ruff format . ruff check --fix .

searchDocs.content: ΏθΦξ όηΒώΑθόΑπϋΔ╜Ύ╝γώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΤΝϊ╝αίΝΨύγΕϊ║Νϋ┐δίΙ╢ίΞΠϋχχΏθΝΞ ϋ╖ρϋψφϋρΑΎ╝γϊ╕Ο JavaήΑΒPythonήΑΒC++ήΑΒGoήΑΒJavaScript ίΤΝ Rust ϊ╣ΜώΩ┤όΩιύ╝ζί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ/ίΠΞί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨόΧ░όΞχΏθΟψ ύ▒╗ίηΜίχΚίΖρΎ╝γώΑγϋ┐Θό┤╛ύΦθίχΠϋ┐δϋκΝύ╝ΨϋψΣόΩ╢ύ▒╗ίηΜόμΑόθξΏθΦΕ ί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρΎ╝γϊ╜┐ύΦρ Rc/Arc ίΤΝί╝▒όΝΘώΤΙϋΘςίΛρϋ┐╜ϋ╕ςίΖ▒ϊ║τίΤΝί╛ςύΟψί╝ΧύΦρΏθπυ ίνγόΑΒΎ╝γϊ╜┐ύΦρ Box<dyn Trait>ήΑΒRc<dyn Trait> ίΤΝ Arc<dyn Trait> ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨ trait ίψ╣ϋ▒κΏθΥο Schema ό╝Φϋ┐δΎ╝γίΖ╝ίχ╣όρκί╝ΠόΦψόΝΒύΜυύτΜύγΕ schema ίΠαόδ┤έγκ ϊ╕νύπΞόρκί╝ΠΎ╝γίψ╣ϋ▒κίδ╛ί║ΠίΙΩίΝΨίΤΝώδ╢όΜ╖ϋ┤ζύγΕίθ║ϊ║ΟϋκΝύγΕόι╝ί╝Π
